examples.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an ActualText attribute to image elements in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API, enabling screen readers to read a description of each image.

examples.title: Add Caption Note to a Figure in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element, bind it to an image, and append a Note element as a caption in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Data-Type Tags to PDF Table Cells and Validate PDF/A Compliance
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a tagged logical structure with a table, assigns custom data‑type tags to each cell, saves the PDF, and validates it for PDF/A‑1B compliance.

examples.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to insert a LinkElement with a title attribute into a tagged PDF and associate it with an external URL using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Figure Title and Alt Text to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a figure element in a tagged PDF, set its Title and AlternativeText for accessibility, and attach it to the document's structure tree.

examples.title: Add a Note Element to a Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a paragraph in a tagged PDF, add a supplemental note element as its child, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a PageBreak element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enabling proper section separation for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element, add a paragraph with ActualText for accessibility, and attach it to the PDF's tagged structure using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Tagged Table to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's Tagged Content API to create a structure‑tree table with 3 rows and 4 columns, set cell text, and save the PDF as a tagged document.

examples.title: Add Text Box Form Field with Placeholder and Tag as Form Element
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a TextBox form field with placeholder text into an existing PDF and tag it as a /Form element for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

examples.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set different border styles for table rows in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, alternating thick red borders for even rows and thin blue borders for odd rows.

examples.title: Batch Auto‑Tag PDFs and Save with Suffix
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to add missing accessibility tags, and save each document with a "_tagged" suffix.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDF/A-1B with Auto‑Tagging
examples.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, enables Aspose.Pdf's auto‑tagging engine, converts the document to PDF/A‑1B (a tagged PDF), and saves the result to a separate output folder.

examples.title: Batch PDF/A-1B Validation with XML Logs and CSV Dashboard
examples.description: The example processes all PDF files in a folder, validates each against PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf, stores the XML validation log, and creates a CSV dashboard summarizing compliance per file.

examples.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate XML Logs with Summary CSV
examples.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a folder, validates each against PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, writes an XML validation log for each file, and creates a summary CSV indicating compliance status.

examples.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, checking its PDF/UA accessibility compliance via the IsPdfUaCompliant property, and writing the boolean outcome to a log file.

examples.title: Create Bullet and Numbered Lists in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing both unordered (bullet) and ordered (numbered) lists using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API to produce accessible documents.

examples.title: Create a Form Field and Associate a Tagged /Form Element
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBox form field to a PDF's AcroForm, create a corresponding /Form structure element, and link the two for accessibility tagging.

examples.title: Create Internal Page Link with Tagged PDF Role /Link
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that jumps to another page and associate it with a Tagged PDF Link element (role /Link) for accessibility.

examples.title: Create Merged Table Header with TH Role and ActualText
examples.description: Demonstrates building a tagged PDF table, merging a header cell across columns, assigning the TH role, and setting ActualText for accessibility.

examples.title: Create PDF with Tagged Heading and Language Attribute
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, enable tagged content, add a level‑1 heading element, and assign a language attribute for accessibility.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with logical structure, set accessibility properties, and add a visible Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API.

examples.title: Create PDF with a Custom Tagged Paragraph
examples.description: Shows how to generate a tagged PDF and assign a custom tag name to a paragraph element using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

examples.title: Enable Automatic Tagging and Save PDF/UA
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable Aspose.Pdf's automatic tagging for PDF/UA compliance, set document language and title, and save the result as a tagged PDF.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, traverses its logical structure tree, and serializes the hierarchy (type, actual text, alternative text) into a formatted JSON file for accessibility analysis.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate HTML Report via XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract a PDF's tagged structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform it with XSLT to produce an HTML report.

examples.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to traverse the structure tree of a tagged PDF, locate all NoteElement objects, concatenate their actual text, and save the result to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, find link annotations, extract their target URLs, and write the page number and URL pairs to a CSV file.

examples.title: Extract Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, reads its tagged (accessibility) logical structure, builds a hierarchical POCO representation, and writes the hierarchy to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, accesses its tagged content, recursively walks the logical structure tree, and collects the ActualText of each structure element to output the extracted text.

examples.title: Filter XML Errors for Missing Alt Text and List Image IDs
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, filter errors that mention missing Alt text, and extract a distinct list of image IDs using LINQ to XML.

examples.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged logical structure, and recursively walks through each StructureElement, logging the element's title, language, and any custom tag.

examples.title: Nested Table Inside Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, enables tagged content, adds a paragraph that contains an outer table with an inner nested table, and walks the logical structure to validate the hierarchy.

examples.title: Parse XML Validation Report for Error and Violation Summary
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract <ErrorCode> and <Violation> elements, and produce frequency summaries using LINQ.

examples.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a language attribute on a PDF's root tagged element and recursively apply it to all child structure elements using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Existing Note Element in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to find and remove existing NoteElement objects in a tagged PDF and add a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set ActualText for Pronunciation in a Tagged PDF Span
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a span element in a tagged PDF, assign visible text, and provide hidden pronunciation text using the ActualText property, then save the document.

examples.title: Set Default Language for All Tagged PDF Elements
examples.description: Loads a PDF, ensures its tagged content has a language attribute, and recursively assigns a default language to any structure elements that lack one.

examples.title: Set Document Language for Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the Title property of a paragraph element in a tagged PDF and add it to the document's logical structure using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Title in Root Structure Element
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and sets the document title on the root structure element while also updating the standard PDF Info title metadata.

examples.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table and apply individual background colors, border thickness, and padding to each cell for better visual accessibility using Aspose.PDF.

examples.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a paragraph by its ActualText using the tagged content API, and replace it with corrected text, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Update Language of a Tagged Paragraph to French
examples.description: Shows how to locate a ParagraphElement in a tagged PDF, set its language to French (fr-FR), and optionally convert the document to PDF/UA compliance before saving.

examples.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
examples.description: Shows how to validate a tagged PDF against the PDF/UA standard using Aspose.Pdf and produce an XML compliance report.

examples.title: Add Blank Page to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, append a new blank page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates an XMP metadata packet, attaches it to the document using SetXmpMetadata, and saves the file while preserving the new metadata.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, log each conversion, and generate a summary CSV file.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, log conversion errors, and save the resulting files.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a Common Password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using the same user and owner passwords, set specific permissions, and write the encrypted files to a separate output directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique user password from each file name and logging those passwords securely.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User Passwords from Config
examples.description: The example reads a JSON configuration containing multiple PDF encryption tasks, applies user and owner passwords with defined permissions using Aspose.Pdf, and logs the outcomes.

examples.title: Batch PDF to PDF/A‑1b Conversion with Compression
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, applying high compression, optimizing resources, and generating a CSV summary report of the conversion results.

examples.title: Batch Split PDF into Sections by Page Ranges
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple files using page ranges read from a configuration file with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Change PDF Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, update its user and owner passwords, and save the document with the new credentials using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, convert its version to PDF 1.5 using Document.Convert, and save the file with an incremental update to avoid rewriting the whole document.

examples.title: Compress PDF Using Default Optimization
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying default resource optimization, saving the compressed file, and comparing the original and compressed file sizes.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Settings
examples.description: Demonstrates applying high compression to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions and PdfSaveOptions, then reports the original and compressed file sizes.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Font and Structure Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A‑1b while logging conversion issues and retaining embedded fonts and document structure, and then save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the resulting PDF/A‑1b document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A-1b compliance while preserving metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (automatically embedding missing fonts) using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 (which enforces CMYK color conversion), and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 While Preserving ICC Profiles
examples.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/X‑3 using Aspose.Pdf and keep any embedded ICC color profiles for accurate printing.

examples.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
examples.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, converts the file to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saves it.

examples.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a new PDF, adding three pages with simple text, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and saving the result.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, decrypting it, and saving an unprotected copy using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF file from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it to the local file system.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and High‑Quality Printing Permission
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, applies AES‑128 encryption with user and owner passwords, enables high‑quality printing permissions, saves the encrypted file, and then verifies the permissions by reopening the document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set no permissions to block printing, and verify the encryption with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, permitting only form filling and disabling content extraction.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, restricts permissions to form filling only, encrypts the document with AES‑256, and saves the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Network Stream and Return Encrypted Stream
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF from a NetworkStream, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and write the encrypted PDF back to the same stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (No User Password)
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, leaving the user password empty and disabling all user permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply 128‑bit RC4 encryption to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, disabling copying permissions, and programmatically verifying the security settings by opening and decrypting the file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Form‑Fill Only Permission
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user and owner password, grants only form‑filling permission (disabling printing), and saves the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying user and owner passwords, setting permissions to disable printing, and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying a user password for opening the file while restricting editing and copying permissions.

examples.title: Export PDF as PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving existing color profiles, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by iterating over each page with Aspose.Pdf and saving each page as its own document.

examples.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF at Specific Position
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from one PDF into another PDF at a given 1‑based position using Aspose.Pdf's Pages.Insert method.

examples.title: Load PDF with Font Embedding Disabled and Save
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF using HtmlLoadOptions with IsEmbedFonts set to false to prevent font embedding, then save the document.

examples.title: Load PDF from MemoryStream, Set Version to 1.4, and Save to File
examples.description: Creates a PDF in memory, loads it from a MemoryStream, converts it to PDF version 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saves the resulting file to disk.

examples.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using a FileStream and then save it to another file with default Aspose.Pdf settings.

examples.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

examples.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Password
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an encrypted PDF with Aspose.Pdf, catching InvalidPasswordException, and handling missing or incorrect password errors.

examples.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page by 180 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific page (page 3) of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90 degrees clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update
examples.description: Demonstrates copying an existing PDF, opening it with a writable stream, appending a new page, and saving using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode to preserve the original content.

examples.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the document title, save the file, and read back the title to confirm the change.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
examples.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information fields such as Author, Title, and Subject, saves the file, and then reopens it to confirm the metadata was written correctly.

examples.title: Split Multi-Page PDF into Separate Page Files
examples.description: Shows how to split a multi-page PDF into individual one-page PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's Document and Pages.Add within a loop.

examples.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page 10
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages into two separate documents, and save each part with descriptive filenames.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files in Separate Folders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a large PDF into individual page PDFs, saving each page in its own folder using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, modify the Author metadata field, and save the changes back to the original file.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the Author field in the document's metadata to the current user, and save the updated file.

examples.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, changing its title metadata, and saving the modified document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compare A Large Batch Of Pdfs Using Parallel Processing Limiting Concurrency To Avoid Excessive Memory Consumption
Compare Encrypted PDFs with Passwords Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates opening password‑protected PDF files by providing user passwords to the Document constructors and performing a side‑by‑side visual comparison, saving the result PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting differences as a diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs for Font Differences Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison to detect font changes as separate diff operations, and optionally generates a JSON report of the differences.

examples.title: Compare PDF Text While Ignoring Compression Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that have identical textual content but different compression settings using Aspose.Pdf, producing a flat text diff that is unaffected by compression.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes
examples.description: Loads two PDFs with differing page dimensions, resizes their first pages to a common size, and performs a graphical comparison using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, saving the result PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs from Memory Streams and Generate Diff PDF
examples.description: Loads two PDF documents directly from MemoryStream objects, compares them page by page using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, and returns a diff PDF as a MemoryStream without creating temporary files.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and treat digital signature fields as unchanged regions by excluding their rectangles from the comparison.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Log Differences by Page
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page with Aspose.Pdf, extract diff operations, and write an audit log containing the operation type and page number.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Text Difference Report
examples.description: Loads two PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf.Comparison's TextPdfComparer to perform a flat text comparison, outputting the number of differences and optionally creating a side‑by‑side visual report. The example notes that case‑insensitive comparison must be handled manually.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Unicode Text Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's Comparison API to detect Unicode text differences between two PDFs with different language encodings and generate a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that contain form fields using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring that field values are taken into account and producing a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, defines a start and end page, and compares each page within that range using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, reporting the number of differences per page.

examples.title: Compare Specific Pages of Two PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare selected pages of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, including page validation and collection of diff operations.

examples.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates collecting annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configuring ComparisonOptions to exclude those areas during a page‑by‑page text comparison.

examples.title: Exclude Areas in Side‑by‑Side PDF Comparison
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files side‑by‑side with Aspose.Pdf while excluding specified rectangular regions from each document.

examples.title: Exclude Footer Areas from PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular footer regions and exclude them from a side‑by‑side PDF comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Image Differences Between Two PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer and save the source, destination, and optional diff images.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to compare two PDF documents and create a highlighted diff PDF saved to a specified folder.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlight Verification
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs using GraphicalPdfComparer, generate a diff PDF with highlighted changes, and verify that the highlight color matches the default documentation value.

examples.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
examples.description: This example demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's text comparison and generate a JSON report of the differences.

examples.title: Generate PDF Comparison Images and Zip Them
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, export the visual differences as PNG images, and package the resulting images into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Comparison Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently with Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer using Task parallelism.

examples.title: Preserve Metadata When Comparing PDFs with Aspose
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and copy all original document metadata—including custom properties—into the diff document.

examples.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF with Original Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs, extract the original text using DiffOperation objects, and create a new PDF where changed text is replaced with the source text.

examples.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs containing scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer with a custom tolerance threshold and export the differences as PNG images.

examples.title: Universal PDF Comparison with Visual Diff
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer to detect differences—including embedded multimedia—and generate a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Add File Attachment and Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external file into a PDF, optionally add a visible attachment annotation, and then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, stamp a company logo on each page, and then save the modified document as a PPTX file.

examples.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and attaching an external XML file as a file attachment annotation.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each page to a high‑resolution JPEG image, and save the images using a custom naming pattern.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF files from a folder and convert each one into a single multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default (no) compression.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Images Preserving Folder Hierarchy
examples.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while maintaining the original folder structure.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
examples.description: Shows how to convert all PDF files in a folder to PPTX format using Aspose.Pdf, enabling the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide as an image.

examples.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and converting it to a PDF document.

examples.title: Convert LaTeX to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF while keeping equations as vector graphics.

examples.title: Convert Markdown to PDF Preserving Code Blocks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping code block formatting intact.

examples.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HPGL/2 Vector Support
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file using Aspose.Pdf, optionally enabling HPGL/2 vector rendering, and saving the result as a PDF document.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG Image
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define a rectangular region on a PDF page using the CropBox and render that specific area to a PNG file with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page number, and convert that specific page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
