examples.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains an index page with clickable links that jump to corresponding section pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document that contains a date picker (DateField) form field using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Dropdown (Combo Box) Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a combo box form field and populate its options from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
examples.description: Shows how to embed a TrueType font (e.g., Arial) into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, add text with that font, and embed standard fonts.

examples.title: Create PDF with Headings and Sanitize While Preserving Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF with hierarchical, auto‑numbered headings using Aspose.Pdf and then creating a sanitized copy by removing annotations while keeping the heading structure intact.

examples.title: Create PDF with a Level 1 Heading
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF document, add a tagged Level 1 heading (H1) to the structure tree, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Rotated Landscape PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to set a page size, rotate it to landscape orientation, and add a text fragment using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Searchable PDF by Overlaying Invisible Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make a scanned PDF searchable by adding invisible OCR text over each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF invoice, add basic text, bind a ZUGFeRD XML file, convert the document to PDF/A‑3U (ZUGFeRD) and save the result.

examples.title: Customize Crash Report Filename with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom message and override the default file name when generating a crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions.

examples.title: Customize PDF Table of Contents Formatting
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf by disabling page numbers and setting different TabLeaderType values for each TOC level.

examples.title: Detect Hidden Annotations in PDF after Sanitization
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and inspect each annotation for the Hidden flag to determine if any hidden annotations remain.

examples.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then reloads the PDF to confirm the attachment is present.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to prevent printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Set Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, and save the protected document.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its EmbeddedFiles collection, and save each embedded file to a specified output directory.

examples.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and link annotations, and write each URI action to a plain‑text list.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and embedded images, and save each image as a PNG file while preserving the original resolution.

examples.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, retrieves its outline (bookmarks) and prints the hierarchical structure to the console as a tree.

examples.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a defined page range using TextAbsorber, and write the extracted content to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all pages' text using TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and extract its embedded XMP metadata, saving it as an XML file.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with interactive form fields, flatten them into static content, and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report for PdfException
examples.description: Demonstrates catching a PdfException when loading a PDF, configuring CrashReportOptions, and generating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
examples.description: Shows how to create an HTML crash report for a caught exception using Aspose.Pdf's built‑in utility and then convert that report to a PDF document.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Output Directory
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure CrashReportOptions to set a custom directory and filename for a crash report, generate the report with Aspose.Pdf, and verify that the file was created.

examples.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Stack Trace for PDF Operations
examples.description: This example shows how to catch PDF processing errors, create a CrashReportOptions object with a custom stack trace, and generate a crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF Crash Report to Network Share
examples.description: Shows how to configure CrashReportOptions to write a PDF crash report to a network share (with a local fallback) and verify the file creation.

examples.title: Create Hierarchical Numbered Headings in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a decimal numbering style to Heading objects to generate hierarchical numbers (chapter, section, subsection) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert A Page From One Pdf Into Another At A Specified Position
Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert an empty page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Insert High-Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a high‑resolution JPEG image to a new PDF page at a specific location using absolute coordinates.

examples.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save
examples.description: Shows how to pause a long‑running PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's InterruptMonitor and CancellationToken, release resources, and then resume the save operation.

examples.title: Load PDF into Aspose.Pdf Document
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object with file existence checking and proper disposal using a using block.

examples.title: Create Magazine-Style PDF with Multi-Column Text and Advertising
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a two‑column article layout using a Table, and optionally add a top advertisement image and a decorative banner shape.

examples.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the outlines (bookmarks) from both source files.

examples.title: Monitor PDF to HTML Conversion Progress
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a custom progress handler to an Aspose.Pdf conversion, handling progress events while saving a PDF as HTML and updating a UI element (console example).

examples.title: Create Multi-Section PDF with Different Page Sizes and Orientations
examples.description: Shows how to add multiple pages to a PDF, each with its own page size and portrait or landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: PDF Processing with Detailed Crash Reporting
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a blank page, saves the document, and wraps the operation in try‑catch blocks that generate detailed Aspose.Pdf crash reports for both library‑specific and unexpected errors.

examples.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Dot Leaders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table of contents where each entry is aligned with custom dot leaders using Aspose.Pdf's TabStops and Table classes.

examples.title: Print PDF Directly to Default Printer
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, configure basic print options, and send the document to the default printer without displaying any dialogs.

examples.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Compression Level
examples.description: Shows how to configure ImageCompressionOptions to set the PNG compression level and rasterize each page of a PDF into lossless PNG images.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF using HiddenDataSanitizer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to strip every annotation from a PDF document and save the sanitized result.

examples.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete all comments/annotations and embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then save the cleaned document.

examples.title: Remove Hidden Data and Re‑Tag PDF for Navigation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stripping hidden metadata and compliance information, optimizing resources, and re‑applying auto‑tagging with language and title to preserve navigation after cleaning.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript from PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strip all document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions, and remove JavaScript attached to annotations, then save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and automatically renumber the remaining pages, then save the result.

examples.title: Replace Image on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locating a page, checking for image resources, replacing the first image with a new one while preserving its placement, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-Generated Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, converting an HTML file to a PDF page, and replacing a specified page in the original document with the new HTML‑derived page.

examples.title: Replace Specific Word in PDF While Preserving Formatting
examples.description: Demonstrates how to search for a word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, replace each occurrence with a new word, and keep the original text formatting intact.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages to 90 Degrees
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees for portrait display on landscape devices, and saves the modified file.

examples.title: Sanitize Hidden PDF Data with Selective Page Rasterization
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a HiddenDataSanitizerOptions.All configuration, disabling global rasterization, enabling it only for chosen pages, removing metadata, JavaScript, and annotations, and then saving the optimized PDF.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF and Add Navigable Headings
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clean a PDF by removing metadata, flattening forms, and optimizing resources, then automatically tag the document and create heading elements for better navigation.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Content While Keeping Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions to strip hidden data such as private info, unused objects and streams from a PDF while preserving its metadata.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts and Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden‑data sanitizer to delete embedded JavaScript actions and embedded files before sanitizing a PDF document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Flattening Forms
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strip hidden metadata and compliance flags, flatten form fields, optimize resources, and save the sanitized document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Information
examples.description: Loads a PDF, clears standard metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance flags, and applies optimization options to strip private info and unused resources before saving the sanitized document.

examples.title: Sanitize PDFs by Removing Metadata and Compliance Tags
examples.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, removes metadata, accessibility and archival tags, flattens forms, optimizes resources, and saves cleaned copies to an output directory.

examples.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that closes the PDF when the current date exceeds a specified expiration date.

examples.title: Set PDF Creation/Modification Dates and Keywords
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign creation and modification dates and custom keywords, and save the updated file.

examples.title: Update PDF Author and Title Metadata
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, reads its current Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1A Compliance and Generate Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1A standard, and save a detailed validation report to a file.

examples.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance and Log Results
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1B standard, and write a validation log file. Also demonstrates checking the IsPdfaCompliant property.

examples.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory PDF, binding a FormEditor, defining a three‑option radio‑button group, setting a default selected option programmatically, and saving the document.

examples.title: Add Text Field to PDF with FormEditor
examples.description: Shows how to add a new text field at specific coordinates to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

examples.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Shows how to wrap the synchronous Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.ExportXml method in Task.Run to export AcroForm data from a PDF to an XML file without blocking the UI thread.

examples.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, bind each with FormEditor, and export its AcroForm fields to individual XML files.

examples.title: Batch Import JSON Data into PDFs in Parallel
examples.description: Shows how to import form data from JSON files into matching PDF forms concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Combine AcroForm JSON Exports from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Exports form data from several PDF files to JSON, merges the individual JSON objects into a single JSON array, and writes the combined result to a file.

examples.title: Export Customer AcroForm Fields to XML
examples.description: Shows how to filter PDF form fields whose names start with "Customer" and write the selected field names and values to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export and Import AcroForm Data via XFDF (Round‑Trip)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export PDF form fields to an XFDF stream, import the XFDF back into a new PDF, and verify that the field values remain unchanged after the round‑trip.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export AcroForm field values from a PDF document into an FDF file via a file stream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Split into Chunks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON document using Aspose.Pdf and then split the JSON into multiple files, each containing up to 100 fields.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Deserialize with Json.NET
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to JSON using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then deserialize the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# object with Json.NET.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Convert to HTML with XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to create a simple AcroForm PDF, export its field values to an XML file using the Form facade, and transform the XML into an HTML view with an XSLT stylesheet.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF directly to an XML string via a MemoryStream, eliminating the need for intermediate files on disk.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field values from a PDF document into an XML file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field values from a PDF into a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and validates the resulting JSON structure.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF into an XFDF file and write the result to disk.

examples.title: Export PDF Text Field Names to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the names of text-type AcroForm fields, and writes them to a formatted JSON array.

examples.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, filter specific AcroForm fields by name, and write their values to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, retrieve all AcroForm field names, and output them as a JSON array from a command‑line utility.

examples.title: Fill AcroForm PDF Fields and Save
examples.description: Shows how to open an AcroForm PDF with Aspose.Pdf, populate its form fields from a dictionary, and save the resulting filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, fills specified AcroForm fields using the Form facade, and returns the updated PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from JSON using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an AcroForm PDF, import field values from a JSON file, and save the filled document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a textbox AcroForm field by name, set its value with Form.FillField, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF Form Field Report Table
examples.description: Creates a PDF report that lists all AcroForm fields with their names, types, and values in a table appended to the original document.

examples.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the currently selected option of a radio button group in an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Import Form Data from FDF into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an FDF file, import its field values into an existing PDF form using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file using the Form facade, optionally inspect import results, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form While Ignoring Missing Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load JSON, filter out entries that don't exist in a PDF AcroForm, and import the filtered data into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates serializing a C# object to JSON, loading it into a memory stream, and importing the data into an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form with Missing Field Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import JSON data into an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade and handle missing form fields by catching PdfException and extracting the field name.

examples.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file and import its form field values into an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

examples.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form and Validate Required Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates importing form data from an XML file into a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then validates that required fields are not empty and logs any violations.

examples.title: Justify Text in a PDF Form TextBox
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set justified alignment for a filled textbox in an existing PDF form using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

examples.title: List PDF Form Field Names with FormEditor
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use FormEditor and the Form facade to retrieve all AcroForm field names and output them to the console.

examples.title: List PDF Form Fields and Export to CSV
examples.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates all AcroForm fields using FormEditor and Form, retrieves each field's type, and writes the field name and type to a CSV report.

examples.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into JSON
examples.description: The example loads several PDF files containing AcroForm fields, extracts each document's form data as JSON, and aggregates the values per field into a single JSON file.

examples.title: Retrieve Radio Button Options and Store in Hashtable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a radio button group, read its option values using the Form facade, and transfer those values into a Hashtable.

examples.title: Import and Export AcroForm Fields with Unicode (UTF‑8)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to preserve Unicode characters in AcroForm fields by exporting to XFDF/XML and importing back using UTF‑8 encoding with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate XML with XSD and Import into PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and then import the validated data into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify Radio Button Options in PDF Form
examples.description: Opens a PDF form, extracts the option names of a specified radio button field, and compares them with an expected set to validate form integrity.

examples.title: Add Custom Annotation Flags to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation, set custom annotation flags, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation
examples.description: Shows how to create a text annotation, embed custom metadata (as JSON) in its dictionary via the Subject field, and apply the changes using PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Diagnostic Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a text annotation, exporting annotations to XFDF, and saving the document while logging each step to a detailed log file.

examples.title: Apply Read‑Only Flag to PDF Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the ReadOnly flag on a TextAnnotation and apply it to all pages of a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to perform common PDF annotation tasks—flattening, deleting, importing, and exporting—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor wrapped in Task.Run for non‑blocking asynchronous execution.

examples.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a backup copy of a PDF file and then flattening all form fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

examples.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a backup copy of a PDF file and then remove all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to PDFs from Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF blobs in Azure Blob Storage, stream each into Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor, add a text annotation, and upload the modified PDF back to a container.

examples.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
examples.description: Shows how to delete all annotations from a PDF except those listed in a JSON configuration file, using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress Indicator
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove all annotations from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and shows a console progress bar indicating the percentage of files processed.

examples.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Batch Export, Delete, and Archive PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDFs, export all annotations to XFDF files, delete the annotations from the PDFs, and save the cleaned documents while archiving the XFDF files.

examples.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation Support
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with asynchronous batch processing and cancellation token handling.

examples.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a directory, flatten their annotations with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the output files with a "_flattened" suffix.

examples.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into Matching PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, locate matching XFDF files by name, and import the annotations into each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs and Generate Report
examples.description: The example iterates through PDF files, counts existing annotations on each page, removes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned PDFs, and creates a summary report of annotations removed per file.

examples.title: Batch Update Annotation Author Across PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and use PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotationsAuthor to replace the author of all annotations in each document.

examples.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to measure and compare the performance of removing all annotations with DeleteAnnotations and removing a single annotation with DeleteAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Check for Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
examples.description: Opens a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, counts annotation names, and logs any duplicate names found.

examples.title: Clone and Recolor PDF Annotation
examples.description: Shows how to clone an existing annotation from one page, change its color, and add the cloned annotation to another page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Clone and Modify a PDF Annotation with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clone the first TextAnnotation on a specified page, change its properties, and add the cloned annotation back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Concurrent Import and Delete Operations on PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to run page import and page delete operations on the same PDF concurrently using multiple threads to test thread safety.

examples.title: Conditional PDF Flattening Based on Digital Signatures
examples.description: The example checks if a PDF contains digital signatures and only flattens form fields when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

examples.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to export annotations from a template PDF to an in‑memory XFDF stream and import them into each PDF in a folder, saving annotated copies.

examples.title: Count Annotations Before and After Deletion
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, count its annotations, delete all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and verify the removal by recounting.

examples.title: Count PDF Annotation Types
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF and count the number of occurrences for each annotation type using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory, bind each with PdfAnnotationEditor, remove every annotation, and overwrite the original file.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove a PDF annotation whose Name (ID) is stored in a variable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotation, with optional creation of a sample PDF.

examples.title: Delete Annotations by Color in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove PDF annotations whose Color property matches a specific RGB value using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

examples.title: Delete All Annotations from a PDF Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: The example creates a PDF with several text annotations, then uses PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to remove them and verifies the result with a unit test.

examples.title: Delete and Flatten Annotations in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, removing all annotations, flattening any remaining ones, and saving the processed document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates removing a named annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, with both a string literal and a variable holding the annotation name.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotation with Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and gracefully handle the case where the annotation does not exist.

examples.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Author Name
examples.description: Shows how to filter PDF annotations by the author's title and remove them using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

examples.title: Delete Specific PDF Annotations Using a Configuration File
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that lists annotation types and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete those annotations from a PDF and save the modified document.

examples.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to scan a directory for PDF files and remove every annotation from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, with optional output to a separate folder.

examples.title: Delete a Specific Annotation from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove a single annotation identified by its name from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, remove only text annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the cleaned document.

examples.title: Export Annotations to XFDF When No Annotations Exist
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a PDF to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf when the document has no annotations and validates the generated XFDF structure.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF stream using PdfAnnotationEditor and then compressing the XFDF data with GZip for efficient storage.

examples.title: Export Annotations from Selected PDF Pages to XFDF Stream
examples.description: Shows how to extract annotations from pages 1‑2 of a PDF and export them to an XFDF memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to filter PDF annotations by the Highlight type and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor overload.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and save the XML with indentation for easier manual editing.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts each annotation's name and its page number, and writes the information to a CSV file.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file and replacing the default XFDF namespace with a custom one using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor and log the generated XFDF content with a timestamp.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, export all its annotations to XFDF, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Import into Another PDF
examples.description: The example shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import that XFDF into a target PDF, reproducing the original annotation layout.

examples.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Visualize as PDF Pages
examples.description: The example extracts every annotation from a source PDF, retrieves each annotation's rectangle, and creates a new PDF where each rectangle is drawn on its own page for visual inspection.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotation Comments and Create Summary PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotation comments from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade and compile them into a new PDF document that serves as a summary.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details to Custom Objects
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read all annotations from a PDF, map their name, type, and rectangle into a custom C# class, and display the extracted information.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Write Audit Log as JSON
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, maps them to a DTO, and writes the data to a formatted JSON audit log.

examples.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations on pages 1‑5 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flattening Date Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all form fields in a PDF and then add a custom metadata entry that records the flattening date in ISO‑8601 UTC format.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from a Stream
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades directly from an input stream and return the modified document as a MemoryStream without any file system access.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and log the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations on a Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates how to scan a network share for PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, and overwrite the originals, suitable for nightly scheduling.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Option to Skip Read‑Only
examples.description: Demonstrates batch processing of PDF files to flatten all annotations while optionally skipping those marked as read‑only via a configuration flag.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, flatten all its annotations, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with a command‑line flag to enable verbose logging for troubleshooting.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then validate that no annotation objects remain in the resulting document.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then confirm that no annotation objects remain by scanning each page's annotation collection.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Content
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and save the flattened document.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Static Graphics
examples.description: Demonstrates flattening all annotations in a PDF while preserving their visual appearance by converting them to static graphics using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Flatten PDFs and Save to Custom Output Directory
examples.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, flattens form fields, and saves the flattened file to a specified output folder while preserving the original file name.

examples.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDF Files
examples.description: Loads PDF documents with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterates through each page's annotations, counts them by AnnotationType, and outputs a summary report for each file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Annotation Report Grouped by Author
examples.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF, group them by the author (Title property of markup annotations), and write a simple text report using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to count the total number of annotations on each page of a PDF document and return the results in a dictionary.

examples.title: Get Annotation Names by Author
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all annotations, and return the names of those whose author (stored in the Subject of a markup annotation) matches a specified string.

examples.title: Import Annotations Without Overwriting Existing Ones
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from one or more source PDFs into a target PDF while preserving the original annotations by disabling the overwrite option.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments and apply the same annotations to several PDF documents, saving the annotated versions to an output folder.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF document, import annotations from an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF stream to PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF stream, and save the modified PDF to a memory stream without using temporary files.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations with Page‑Range Filtering
examples.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then restrict them to a specific page range by flattening annotations outside that range.

examples.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF and Delete Temporary File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import form field values from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful import.

examples.title: List Annotation Names in PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterate through each page, and print the Name of every annotation. Includes a helper that creates a sample PDF with a text annotation if the file is missing.

examples.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to measure and log the execution time of PDF annotation operations such as delete, create, and flatten using Aspose.Pdf and a Stopwatch.

examples.title: Log File Sizes After Flattening PDF Annotations
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, records its original size, flattens all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the flattened document, and logs the new file size to provide an audit trail.

examples.title: Log PDF Annotation Deletions to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate all annotations in a PDF, write their name, type, and page number to a CSV log, delete the annotations, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Measure Execution Time
examples.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all its annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, measures the time taken with Stopwatch, and saves the flattened document.

examples.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to combine several XFDF annotation files into a single XFDF document and import the merged data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge PDF Annotation Layers into a Single PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a base PDF, import annotation layers from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the merged result.

examples.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to replace the author of annotations on a given PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Modify Annotation Subject and Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the subject and color of an existing PDF annotation by creating a template TextAnnotation and applying it with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

examples.title: Parallel Deletion of PDF Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor with Parallel.ForEach to remove all annotations from a large set of PDFs concurrently and save the cleaned files.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Deletion Tool (WinForms)
examples.description: Shows a WinForms GUI that opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, lists distinct annotation types, lets the user select types to delete, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Folder Watcher to Flatten PDF Annotations
examples.description: Shows a background service that monitors a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, saving the processed PDFs to an output folder.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Binding, Deleting, Flattening, and Saving
examples.description: Demonstrates a reusable C# helper that wraps Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, delete annotations (all or by type), flatten them, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Simplified PDF Annotation Helper
examples.description: Shows a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, offering concise methods to delete, export, import, modify, redact, and save PDF annotations.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Operations (Delete, Flatten, Export)
examples.description: A command‑line utility that demonstrates how to delete pages, flatten all annotations, and export annotations to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, delete every annotation in the document, and save the cleaned PDF to a new file.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete every annotation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the cleaned document via a console application.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF stream to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document back to a stream or file.

examples.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to delete all Link annotations on pages 3 through 7 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, identify annotations older than a given number of days, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf before saving the cleaned document.

examples.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all pages and annotations in a PDF and rename each annotation using a standardized prefix via Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Retry Annotation Modification with Exponential Backoff
examples.description: Demonstrates modifying PDF annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor and applying an exponential back‑off retry policy to handle transient I/O errors such as file sharing violations.

examples.title: Retry Deleting PDF Annotation with PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, delete a specific annotation, and implement a simple retry mechanism if the first attempt fails.

examples.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
examples.description: Iterates through each page and annotation in a PDF, setting the Open property of TextAnnotation and PopupAnnotation to true, then saves the modified document.

examples.title: Test ExportAnnotations throws exception on unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF document raises an exception.

examples.title: Update Annotation Modified Date to Current Time
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the Modified property of PDF annotations to the current system time using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and then save the updated document.

examples.title: Update Annotation Modified Timestamp in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to set the Modified property on existing annotations across all pages of a PDF, enabling tracking of when each annotation was last changed.

examples.title: Update Annotation Subject Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a text annotation, then uses PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to change the annotation's Subject property and verifies the update with a unit test.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to validate a PDF after annotation changes with Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade, generate a compliance log, and handle corrupted object exceptions.

examples.title: Validate XFDF File Against XFDF Schema
examples.description: Shows how to load an exported XFDF file and validate it against the XFDF XSD schema using XmlReaderSettings, while referencing the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

examples.title: Verify PdfAnnotationEditor Binding to PDF
examples.description: Shows a health check that binds a PdfAnnotationEditor to a sample PDF, confirms the document is loaded with pages, and reports any errors.

examples.title: Add Colored Bookmarks to PDF Sections
examples.description: Shows how to create PDF bookmarks with custom colors (red for warnings, green for informational sections) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that executes JavaScript code when clicked using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Add Sub‑Bookmarks to PDF Chapter
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a parent bookmark for a chapter, attaching child bookmarks for sections, and saving the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to First Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a top-level bookmark that links to the first page of a PDF and sets its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert pages at the beginning of a PDF and shift existing bookmark destinations accordingly using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Add 'Reviewed' Bookmark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder and add a "Reviewed" bookmark on the last page of each document using the PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

examples.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open password‑protected PDFs, remove all bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned files in a batch operation.

examples.title: Validate Bookmark Page Numbers Against Table of Contents
examples.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks, generates a simple table of contents by reading the first line of each page, and compares the two to report missing or mismatched entries.

examples.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks to Improve Outline Visibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set selected PDF bookmarks to a collapsed state using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, improving the initial outline view for readers.

examples.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a named destination to a PDF and then create a bookmark that links to that destination using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create Hierarchical Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor, build a hierarchy of Chapter and Section bookmarks, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Create Bookmarks for Images in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate images on each page of a PDF and add bookmarks that navigate directly to those pages using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

examples.title: Create PDF Bookmarks with External URLs
examples.description: Shows how to add bookmarks that open external web pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Delete All Bookmarks from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Delete a Bookmark from PDF and Verify Removal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific bookmark from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, save the updated document, and confirm the deletion by re‑extracting the bookmarks.

examples.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract its bookmarks, and automatically remove those whose titles match a specified regular expression using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to extract the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page number, and hierarchy level to a CSV file.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Excel Workbook
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, place their title, level, and destination page into a table, and save the result as an Excel file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Hierarchical JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert them into a nested object model, and serialize the hierarchy to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert it to a DTO, and serialize the structure to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
examples.description: Shows how to extract bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark hierarchy.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document with PdfBookmarkEditor and export its bookmark hierarchy to an XML file.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve bookmark records (simulated) and add them to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read hierarchical bookmark data from a JSON file, convert it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and add them to a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Import CSV Bookmarks into PDF
examples.description: The example reads a CSV file containing bookmark title, level, and page number, builds a hierarchical Bookmark structure, and adds it to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Import and Merge Bookmarks from External PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract bookmarks from a source PDF and add them to another PDF while preserving their order using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from OFD into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an OFD file, extract its bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and add those bookmarks to a new PDF document.

examples.title: Modify PDF Bookmark Title Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, change an existing bookmark title, and return the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, filter out duplicates based on title and page number, delete the original bookmarks, and recreate only the unique ones using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using a Translation Dictionary
examples.description: Shows how to rename existing PDF bookmarks by applying a translation map with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Set Bookmark Zoom Level to 150% in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to update PDF bookmark entries so that pages open at 150% magnification using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Update PDF Bookmark Destination to Page 10
examples.description: Demonstrates locating a bookmark in a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, changing its destination to page 10, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case with Proper Nouns
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract PDF bookmarks, convert their titles to title case while preserving defined proper nouns, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Count Using PdfBookmarkEditor
examples.description: Creates a simple PDF, adds a bookmark for each page with PdfBookmarkEditor, saves it, then extracts the bookmarks to verify that the count matches the number of pages.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to extract only odd-numbered pages from a PDF and save each page as an individual PNG file.

examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert a specific page range (pages 3 to 8) of a PDF document into BMP image files.

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate pages 3 through 8, and convert each page to a TIFF file using the TiffDevice with default resolution and CropBox.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter to extract each page of a PDF and save it as a separate TIFF file, with optional sample PDF creation.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert the first ten pages of a PDF document to JPEG images at 150 DPI using the CropBox coordinate type with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages 1-3 to JPEG Preview Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to generate JPEG images for the first three pages of a PDF, creating a three‑page preview.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF into separate JPEG files with sequential page-number naming.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages 4-9 to Multi-Page TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting a specific page range from a PDF and saving it as a single multi-page TIFF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to convert each page of a PDF into separate PNG files with sequential naming.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to Individual TIFF Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to split a PDF into separate TIFF files, one per page, using default settings.

examples.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images with 200 DPI
examples.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF to BMP images at 200 DPI using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter with the default CropBox.

examples.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images with Resolution Settings
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to convert each page of a PDF document into BMP images, configuring the output resolution before conversion.

examples.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images with Font Substitution
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to BMP images using Aspose.Pdf, with automatic font substitution for missing fonts and configurable resolution.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to BMP Images (1‑20) at 150 DPI
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over the first 20 pages (or up to the document length), and render each page to a BMP file using a 150 DPI resolution.

examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert a specific page range of a PDF into BMP image files.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF to BMP images with automatic margin cropping using the PdfConverter facade's default CropBox coordinate type.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to BMP images while substituting Times New Roman with Calibri using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images at 300 DPI
examples.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF into separate JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade with a 300 DPI resolution and the default CropBox coordinate type.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images at 96 DPI
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF into separate JPEG files with a web‑friendly 96 DPI resolution.

examples.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images Using PdfConverter
examples.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF into separate JPEG files while preserving the original page dimensions and color depth using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade.

examples.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF document into separate JPEG files saved in an output folder.

examples.title: Convert PDF to JPEG with Font Substitution
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF to JPEG images while providing a fallback font for any missing fonts using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF with 400 DPI
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert a PDF into a single multi-page TIFF image at 400 DPI resolution.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert a PDF file into a single multi-page TIFF image with a resolution of 600 DPI.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf, while applying a custom font substitution that maps the Symbol font to Arial Unicode MS.

examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a multi-page TIFF image while substituting the Courier font with Liberation Mono for better rendering.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with 300 DPI
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to bind a PDF, set a 300 dpi resolution, and save all pages as a single multi‑page TIFF file.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter to transform a PDF into a single multi-page TIFF image while substituting Symbol fonts with Arial Unicode MS for proper symbol rendering.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PNG Images at 300 DPI
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF document into separate PNG files at 300 DPI.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PNG Images with 72 DPI Preview
examples.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF into PNG images at 72 DPI using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter for quick preview generation.

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a 72 DPI resolution, and convert each page to a PNG file while preserving the visible content defined by the page's CropBox.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to separate PNG files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter while processing pages concurrently with Parallel.For to speed up the conversion.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PNG Images in Reverse Page Order
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to convert each page of a PDF into PNG files while processing the pages from the last to the first.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PNG with Font Substitution

examples.description: Demonstrates how to substitute missing fonts with a fallback (Arial) and convert each page of a PDF document to PNG images using the PdfConverter facade.

examples.title: Append PDF Pages to Another Document

examples.title: Apply 4‑up Layout to PDF via Stream Overload

examples.description: Shows how to create a text stamp, rotate it 90° and add it as an annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Select Express Shipping Radio Button in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF containing an AcroForm, set the 'ShippingMethod' radio button group to the 'Express' option, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Checkbox Field to True in PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically check a checkbox field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example loads a PDF, sets the specified checkbox to true, and saves the result.

examples.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
examples.description: Shows how to configure a PDF to use continuous scrolling (one‑column layout) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read the current viewer preferences of a PDF, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Multiple Viewer Preferences for a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine viewer preferences such as CenterWindow and HideToolbar using bitwise OR and apply them to a PDF with PdfContentEditor before saving.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Disallow Form Editing and Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to configure document privileges so that text copying is allowed while form field editing and annotation modifications are prohibited.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Hide Navigation Panels
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone, which hides navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outlines Panel
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure the PDF viewer preference so that the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, change its viewer preference to a single-page layout using PdfContentEditor, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preferences to single‑page layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences: Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with the thumbnails pane visible and set the default zoom to fit the window using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Sign and Certificate‑Encrypt PDF
examples.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF using a private certificate and then encrypt it with a recipient's public certificate so only the intended user can open the document.

examples.title: Simplified PDF Editing Wrapper
examples.description: Shows a wrapper class that encapsulates Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to load a PDF, replace text, add web‑link annotations, and save the edited file.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to split an edited PDF into individual one‑page PDFs while preserving all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

examples.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to locate a given phrase on page 4 of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Creator Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF's XMP metadata, replace the dc:creator entry with a new value, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata with Custom Project Schema
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind to an existing PDF and add custom XMP metadata fields using a custom namespace for a project identifier and version number.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Modification Using SHA-256
examples.description: Shows how to modify a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verify its integrity by comparing SHA‑256 checksums of the original and edited files.

examples.title: Verify Text Annotation Position on PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a text annotation using PdfContentEditor, and unit‑test that the annotation's rectangle matches the expected coordinates.

examples.title: Viewer Preferences Persistence Test
examples.description: The example sets viewer preferences on a PDF using PdfContentEditor, saves the file, reopens it, and asserts that the preferences are retained.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract PDF text and images asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, keeping UI threads responsive with async/await and cancellation support.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Matching Text Files
examples.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF documents, extract their text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write each output to a .txt file that shares the original filename.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a folder and save each as a .txt file.

examples.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while allowing the operation to be aborted via a CancellationToken and InterruptMonitor.

examples.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether the PDF file contains any textual content.

examples.title: Check PDF for Text and Images using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF contains both textual content and at least one image.

examples.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, with the extraction options controlled by an external JSON configuration file.

examples.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
examples.description: Extracts all images from an input PDF and generates a new PDF that shows those images as thumbnails arranged in a grid layout.

examples.title: Create PDF Summary from First Three Pages
examples.description: Extracts text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and generates a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary document.

examples.title: Detect Text‑Only PDF by Extracting Images
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF and determine if the document contains only text by confirming that no images are produced.

examples.title: Error Handling for PdfExtractor BindPdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfExtractor and catch specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions that occur when the file is corrupted or has an invalid format.

examples.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality 85
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file and save them as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter with a quality setting of 85.

examples.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to extract every image from a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor by setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 to process all pages.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Compress as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting rendered images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and re‑encoding them as losslessly compressed PNG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
examples.description: Demonstrates scanning each PDF page for a specific keyword and extracting only the images from pages where the keyword is found using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and combining them into a single PNG sprite sheet.

examples.title: Extract Images Defined in PDF Resources
examples.description: Shows how to set the ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and use PdfExtractor to retrieve images that are stored as PDF resources rather than inline.

examples.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract all embedded images, and save them to a specified directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

examples.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from each PDF page, save them as PNG files, and create a CSV file that records the image filename, page number, width, and height.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF document and package them into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and uploading the images to an Amazon S3 bucket via the AWS SDK.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extracting all images, and saving them to a folder while using a using block to automatically dispose the extractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them to a temporary directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Markdown Gallery
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, save them as files, and generate a markdown file with image links for documentation.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then runs OCR on each image with Aspose.Pdf.AI to retrieve hidden text.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting ExtractImageMode to ActuallyUsed.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Manifest
examples.description: The example extracts all images from each page of a PDF, saves them as PNG files, and creates a CSV file that lists each image's file name, page number, and dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read permissions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed as Base64 in HTML
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them directly into an HTML report via data URIs.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them as PNG files, and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images as a gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generating PNG thumbnails with a maximum dimension of 200 pixels.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Base64 JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, convert them to Base64 strings, and save the results as a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading the images to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, convert each image stream to a Base64 string, and serialize the results to JSON.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as BMP
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all images from a PDF and save each one as a BMP file, preserving the original resolution and color depth.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create an Image Portfolio
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and assemble them into a new PDF where each image occupies its own page.
