examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on new pages, and convert the result to a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.

examples.description: Shows how to extract images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and convert each image to a lossless TIFF file with TiffDevice for archival storage.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Share with Fallback
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them to a network UNC path, with a ping check and fallback to a local folder if the share is unavailable.

examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as PNG files to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF with Watermark Overlay

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull embedded attachments from a PDF and save them into subfolders based on each file's original extension.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
examples.description: The example extracts all file attachments from a PDF, saves them to a folder, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for each saved file to verify integrity.

examples.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to retrieve embedded file attachments from a PDF and write each one to a specified output folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and upload each image as a PNG to an Azure Blob container.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Insert into Word Document
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract images from a PDF and embed each image into a Word document using the Open XML SDK.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Verify File Signatures
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves each as a PNG file, and validates the saved file's magic number to ensure the image is not corrupted.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then create a video slideshow from the extracted JPEG files with FFmpeg.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Encrypt with AES
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then encrypt the resulting .txt file with AES‑256 before saving.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Split into Pages

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream, producing a compressed .txt.gz file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and insert the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder for Manipulation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, load it into a StringBuilder for processing, and then save the manipulated text to a file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Write to StringWriter
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract Unicode text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and capture it in a StringWriter for logging or further processing.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract its text using UTF-8 encoding with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write the result to a UTF-8 text file.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor while reporting progress to the console.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text per Page with Progress Indicator
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor while displaying a console progress bar.

examples.title: Extract and Rename PDF Attachments with Timestamp
examples.description: Shows how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each file with a unique timestamp‑prefixed name.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract both the textual content and embedded images from a PDF file and save them to separate files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a PDF file into a byte array, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull the text, and returning the extracted content as JSON.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF stored in a byte array to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text entirely in memory, and convert the result to a .NET string.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract plain text from a PDF document and save it as a UTF-8 encoded .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the Unicode content to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage

examples.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to provide the owner password to a PdfExtractor, bind a protected PDF, and extract its text to a file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream without Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF received as a stream to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and extract all textual content and embedded images directly into memory.

examples.title: Extract Text Only from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF while ignoring all images by not invoking the image extraction method.

examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, save it to a temporary file, read it back, and verify that the saved content matches the original extraction.

examples.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to retrieve the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without saving the files.

examples.title: Parallel Image Extraction from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

examples.title: Report PDF Page, Image, and Attachment Counts
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to obtain the total number of pages, images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

examples.title: Unit Test for PdfExtractor Text Extraction
examples.description: Shows how to generate a temporary PDF with known text, extract that text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and verify the output with a unit test.

examples.title: Retry PDF Text Extraction with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor with a retry loop that handles IOException and retries up to three times.

examples.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how the ExtractImageMode property of PdfExtractor influences the number of images extracted, distinguishing between resources defined in the PDF and images actually placed on pages.

examples.title: Add Date Header to PDF Using AutoFiller and PdfFileStamp

examples.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent text watermark to every page of a PDF that has already been filled, using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

examples.description: Shows how to protect a filled PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades after it has been saved.

examples.title: Asynchronous XLSX Read and PDF Write

examples.description: Shows how to stream a large CSV (converted from XLSX) in batches and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template for each row, preventing memory overload.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form repeatedly with different DataTable data sets, producing separate filled PDFs for each entry.

examples.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF from a file path or stream and obtain its contents as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, without writing to disk.

examples.title: Convert Large PDF to Excel Using Temporary Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates using a temporary directory for intermediate files while converting a large PDF to Excel with Aspose.Pdf to avoid disk‑space issues.

examples.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom Names from DataTable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a source PDF into individual pages and save each page using a custom file name taken from a DataTable column.

examples.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Using AutoFiller and DataTable

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV Using a Mapping Configuration
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a CSV export of Excel, applying a JSON‑based column‑to‑PDF‑field map, and populating an Aspose.Pdf form with the first data row.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to read field names and values from a CSV file and populate an existing PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, then save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Excel Data using AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to convert an uploaded XLSX file to a DataTable, bind it to a PDF template, and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller class.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form template in memory, populating it with data from a DataTable, and filling the form using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller without writing intermediate files.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF template, importing data from a DataTable into form fields with AutoFiller, saving the filled PDF, and automatically disposing the object.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable and AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF form template, build a DataTable with matching columns, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import the data and generate a filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Exception Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to populate a PDF form from a DataTable and includes robust exception handling for missing files and PDF processing errors.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, fill a form field, and save the document asynchronously while using a CancellationToken to abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout.

examples.title: Fill PDF Template with Multiple CSV Worksheets Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Loads each CSV file into a DataTable, binds a PDF template, imports the table with AutoFiller, and saves a separate PDF for each worksheet.

examples.title: Filter DataTable and Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a CSV into a DataTable, filtering rows based on a condition, and using Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller to populate matching form fields in a PDF template and save a subset PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF Page Summary with DataTable Row IDs

examples.description: Creates a PDF form template, configures a DataTable with ReadOnly and Unique column settings, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import the data into matching PDF fields.

examples.title: Load CSV into DataTable for Form Mapping

examples.title: Log Processed DataTable Rows While Creating PDF Pages

examples.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Form Fields and Fill the PDF

examples.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs from DataTables into a Single PDF

examples.title: Create PDF with One Page per DataTable Row

examples.title: Retry AutoFiller Import with Transient File Access Handling

examples.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF's security settings to permit printing while preventing content copying, then saves the updated document.

examples.title: Test Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password and verify that decryption throws an InvalidPasswordException when a wrong owner password is provided, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades in a unit test.

examples.title: Update Owner Password of Protected PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change only the owner password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without affecting the user password or permissions.

examples.title: Update PDF Owner Password While Preserving User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files and change only the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving the existing user password unchanged.

examples.title: Validate PDF Encryption Before Decryption
examples.description: The example checks whether a PDF file is encrypted using PdfFileInfo, copies it unchanged if not, and if it is encrypted, attempts to decrypt it with the owner password via PdfFileSecurity.

examples.title: Add a Second Digital Signature on Page 3
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an additional visible digital signature to page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including certificate setup, appearance image, and custom rectangle positioning.

examples.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF on Specific Page
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field to a specific page of a PDF and then applying a PKCS#1 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Configure Custom Signature Appearance with Image and Background Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a foreground image and a background color for a PDF digital signature using Aspose.Pdf's SignatureCustomAppearance before signing the document.

examples.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Caption
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while hiding the default "Digitally signed by" label by using a custom signature appearance.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Visible Signature on First Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, set a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, then save the signed document.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Reason and Location
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a visible digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying the signature reason and location.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the X.509 certificate information such as issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract Certificate from PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve the signing certificate from a digital signature field in a PDF document and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract and Log Signature Certificate Serial Number
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the X.509 certificate for each signature, and log the certificate's serial number for auditing.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract the image of the 'WitnessSignature' signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and convert the JPEG stream to a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images to HTML Report
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's image using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, and embeds the images as Base64 data URIs in an HTML file for visual inspection.

examples.title: Extract Signing Certificate Subject DN from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, retrieve the first signature, extract its X.509 certificate, read the subject distinguished name, and store it in an in‑memory DataTable.

examples.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
examples.description: Shows how to extract digital signature details from a PDF using PdfFileSignature and create a new PDF that lists each signature's signer, reason, location, date, validity, revision and coverage.

examples.title: List Signature Names in a PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve the names of all active signatures in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: List Signature Reasons and Locations in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all signature names, and extract each signature's reason and location for auditing.

examples.title: Locale‑Specific PDF Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital signature to a PDF with locale‑specific labels and appearance settings for German, Spanish, and Japanese languages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
examples.description: Shows how to walk through a directory tree, open each PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, remove all digital signatures, and save the file back.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to delete all digital signatures from a PDF document and save a clean copy.

examples.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing Signature Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific signature from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades while gracefully handling the case where the signature does not exist.

examples.title: Remove Signature from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete a digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save the updated document.

examples.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with a New Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing digital signatures from a PDF and then apply a new signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Retry Signing PDF When File Is Locked
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while handling file‑locking issues by implementing a retry loop with configurable attempts and delay.

examples.title: Sign and Verify PDF Using PdfFileSignature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a certificate using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and then immediately verify the signature's authenticity.

examples.title: Sign PDF with French Digital Signature Caption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and configure the SignatureCustomAppearance to display the caption in French.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and add a visible signature image positioned at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Hidden Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while completely hiding the signature appearance, preserving cryptographic validity.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF file using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Semi‑Transparent Background Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and configure a custom signature appearance with a light‑gray (semi‑transparent) background to improve document readability.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: A console application that adds a visible signature appearance from an image to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. It loads the PDF, sets the signature image, defines its position, and saves the signed document.

examples.title: Suppress Signature Reason and Location When Signing PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while suppressing the reason, location, and contact info by setting those signature properties to empty strings.

examples.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a signed PDF, retrieve all signature names, and verify each signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, check if it contains any digital signatures, and attempt to verify a non‑existent signature, which should return false.

examples.title: Verify Presence and Validity of a PDF Signature
examples.description: Shows how to determine whether a PDF contains a signature named 'ContractSigner' and then verify that signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and validate the cryptographic integrity of a signature field named "ManagerSignature" using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

examples.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Log Results to JSON
examples.description: The example opens a signed PDF, checks each embedded signature for validity, and writes the signature name and verification status to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Add Background Image Watermark to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image watermark as a background stamp to pages 2‑5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF's creation date (or use the current date) and add it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a text stamp that displays the current page number, converting a custom {page_number} placeholder to Aspose's required '#'.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp with interpolated date and author information and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a header containing the {file_name} placeholder to every page of a PDF, then save the stamped document.

examples.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a text stamp with the current date and place it as a footer on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Footer Stamp with Bottom Margin to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a footer stamp to a PDF using PdfFileStamp and position it 10 points above the page bottom edge.

examples.title: Add Footer with Page Count to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add a footer containing the {page_count} placeholder to every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a centered header stamp containing a company name using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a stamp that combines a logo image with custom formatted text and apply it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a company logo image and a bold "Confidential" text stamp on a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Lower Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
examples.description: Shows how to apply lower‑roman page number stamps to odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, load it from a MemoryStream, and apply a multi‑line text watermark with custom font size and color using the PdfFileMend facade.

examples.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark Using FormattedText
examples.description: Shows how to build a FormattedText object with multiple lines using AddNewLineText and apply it as a header watermark on every page with PdfFileStamp.

examples.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a multi-line text watermark to all pages of a PDF, applying different font sizes for visual hierarchy.

examples.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Leading Zeros
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add Arabic numeral page numbers with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to stamp a PDF with a QR code image and a descriptive text label for product verification.

examples.title: Add Repeating Background Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a single Stamp instance as a background watermark that repeats on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Text Stamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a semi‑transparent background text stamp (e.g., CONFIDENTIAL) to all pages of a PDF while preserving readability.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Transparent Confidential Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent CONFIDENTIAL text stamp on specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Custom Stamp Annotation with Border to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a yellow stamp annotation with a 3‑point border to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages Efficiently
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp with a Stamp object to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF in one operation.

examples.title: Apply Multi‑Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add several header lines with different font colors to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Text Stamp with 1.5 Line Spacing
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted multi-line text watermark with custom line spacing, binding it to a stamp, and applying the stamp to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text watermark with custom line spacing and applying it as a background stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a page from another PDF as a background stamp to every page of a document.

examples.title: Apply PDF Stamp and Save to New Directory

examples.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a 30‑degree rotated image stamp to the bottom‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
examples.description: Shows how to add a 30-degree rotated text stamp to the left margin of every odd-numbered page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Rotating Stamps to Each PDF Page

examples.title: Apply Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp and apply it only to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Text Stamp to Even Pages in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a text stamp only to even-numbered pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a 50% opaque image stamp as a background watermark on all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and apply a rotated image stamp only to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Stamp to Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files on a network share and add a rotated page‑based stamp to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Add Multi-Line Text Watermark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply the same multi-line text watermark to each document using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

examples.title: Create a Branded Text Stamp with a Custom TrueType Font
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font from file and use it to create a text stamp for branding PDF pages with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to add a cover page PDF as a background to all pages of another PDF, creating a merged document.

examples.title: Create Multi‑Line Watermark with Different Font Styles
examples.description: Shows how to add a three‑line watermark to a PDF, each line using its own font, size, color and opacity, by binding FormattedText to Stamp objects and applying them to all pages.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a single‑page disclaimer PDF onto the first page of each target PDF in a folder.

examples.title: Overlay Image Stamp on PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp that overlays existing content on all pages of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API and explicitly setting IsBackground to false.

examples.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting its Rotation to 90 degrees with PdfFileStamp, and applying it to all pages of a PDF.

examples.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp, setting its Rotation property to 45°, positioning it, and applying it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileMend facade to overlay a PNG image as a full‑page background on every page of an existing PDF document.

examples.title: Add Company Logo to All PDF Pages

examples.title: Add Header Image to PDF Files

examples.title: Add Image and Text Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine an image stamp and a semi‑transparent text stamp using Aspose.Pdf Facades to create a watermark over each page of a PDF document.

examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to bind a PDF, insert an image and formatted text on specific pages, and log each operation with a timestamp for audit purposes.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF and Return as MemoryStream

examples.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to insert an image onto a chosen page of a PDF document at given rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's file format and then add the image to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example checks for supported formats before invoking the AddImage method.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF and Verify Byte Size Increase

examples.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Spacing to PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a FormattedText block, add lines with custom line spacing, and place the block on the left margin of page three using the PdfFileMend facade.

examples.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, insert a PNG image onto page two at specific coordinates, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Promotional Text to Multiple PDF Pages

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the final page of an existing PDF without modifying the existing content.

examples.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Shows how to wrap PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run to add an image to the first page of a PDF without blocking the calling thread.

examples.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
examples.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files, extract images from each page using PdfExtractor, and save them with filenames that include the PDF name, page number, and image index.

examples.title: Dynamic Image Placement on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates calculating image coordinates from a PDF page's dimensions and adding the image using the PdfFileMend facade.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages 2‑5
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF within a specific page range and save them to a temporary directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF document and save each image as an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Insert PNG Signature on All PDF Pages with PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileMend facade to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of every page in a PDF and save the modified document.

examples.title: Modify PDF Using PdfFileMend with Try-Finally Cleanup
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, optionally modifying it, saving the result, and guaranteeing that the PdfFileMend facade is closed in a finally block to ensure resources are released.

examples.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF on PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's compositing parameters and PdfFileMend.

examples.title: Remove All Images from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete every image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Remove Image from PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to delete a specific image on a given page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Replace PDF Image with High‑Resolution BMP

examples.description: Creates a blank PDF, adds a free‑text annotation at a specific rectangle using PdfContentEditor, then loads the result and asserts that the annotation's rectangle matches the expected X and Y coordinates.

examples.title: Wrap Text by Words Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the ByWords word‑wrapping mode with PdfFileMend and add a long paragraph that automatically wraps within the defined page width.

examples.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to set the Creator metadata field of an Aspose.Pdf Document using the PdfFileInfo facade via a reusable extension method.

examples.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing

examples.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata

examples.title: Copy XMP Metadata Between PDFs and Merge
examples.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, apply it to a target PDF, and then concatenate the PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create XMP Metadata and Attach to New PDF

examples.title: Detect and Modify XMP Metadata in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF via stream, checking for existing XMP metadata, optionally updating a property, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for HTML to PDF Conversion in Test Environments
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a configuration switch that disables BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF in test environments, using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

examples.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and serialize it as a JSON file for integration with non‑XML systems.

examples.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document, retrieve its full XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the metadata to a separate .xmp side‑car file.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to read XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert the key/value pairs into a simple dictionary for easy consumption.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF

examples.title: Handle Encrypted PDF with BindPdf and Decrypt
examples.description: Demonstrates catching InvalidPasswordException when binding an encrypted PDF, decrypting it with a password using PdfFileSecurity, and then extracting text with PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Insert Pages and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to insert selected pages from one PDF into another and then add or update XMP metadata before saving the final document.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, extract all XMP property keys, derive their namespace prefixes, and display each prefix with its corresponding namespace URI.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract its XMP metadata as XML bytes.

examples.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract its XMP metadata as XML, change a property (e.g., dc:creator) and write the updated metadata back to the PDF.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve its XMP packet, and parse the XML to extract properties such as creator and creation date.

examples.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
