examples.description: Shows how to set the CropBox of each page using rectangle coordinates to trim a uniform margin from all pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, calculate a 4:3 crop region for each page, and apply it using the CropBox property, then save the result.

examples.title: Delete First Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the first page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf, and overwrite the original files.

examples.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to remove the final three pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf by deleting pages in descending order and saving the updated file.

examples.title: Delete PDF Pages from List
examples.description: Demonstrates reading page numbers from a text file and deleting those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Delete a Range of PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method.

examples.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to read page numbers from a configuration file and delete those pages from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Duplicate Third Page in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, reads each page's width and height, and writes the page number and dimensions to a CSV file for external analysis.

examples.title: Extract, Resize, and Reinsert PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change their dimensions to A4, and insert them at a new position using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at index three, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Insert Blank Pages to Double PDF Page Count
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, inserts an empty page after each existing page to double the total number of pages, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Insert Custom-Sized Empty Page into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read page width and height from the console, insert a new empty page into an existing PDF, set the custom page size, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Custom-Sized Page at Beginning of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an empty page with a custom size of 200 × 300 points to the start of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert External PDF Page at Specific Position
examples.description: Loads a target and a source PDF, extracts a page from the source, and inserts it into the target document at index 2 while preserving the original size and rotation.

examples.title: Insert Page Numbers with Superscript Formatting
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers to each PDF page using a PageNumberStamp and adjust the bottom margin and font size to achieve a superscript appearance.

examples.title: Insert New Page with Same Size as Page 2
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the dimensions of an existing PDF page and insert a new empty page at a specific position using the same size.

examples.title: Insert Roman Numeral Page Numbers into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers in uppercase Roman numerals to the first few pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
examples.description: Shows how to calculate the middle index of a PDF document and batch insert ten empty pages at that position using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reposition the ninth page of a PDF to the first position using Aspose.Pdf's page collection manipulation methods.

examples.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to relocate pages 3 through 6 of a PDF to the document's end using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move PDF Page Between Documents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to transfer a single page from one PDF file to another while preserving its original rotation, size, and other page properties.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the file.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
examples.description: Opens a PDF file, iterates through each page, and logs the width and height (in points) of every page to the console.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Width and Height
examples.description: Loads a PDF document and iterates through each page to calculate and log its width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove and Add Headers and Footers to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clear existing headers and footers on each page of a PDF and assign new header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Existing Bates Numbering and Add New Sequence to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete all Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF and then apply a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete all Bates numbering stamps from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PageCollectionExtensions. The example loads a PDF, removes the numbering, and saves the result.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, separate pages into landscape and portrait groups, and save a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, copy its pages in reverse (descending) order into a new document, optionally balance the page tree, and save the reordered file.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages: Move Even Pages to End
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, separate odd and even pages, and create a new document where all even‑numbered pages are appended after the odd ones while preserving their original order.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rearrange pages of an existing PDF by specifying a new order array and saving the result as a new document.

examples.title: Reset PDF Page Rotation to Original Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all pages, set each page's rotation to the default (0°) and save the restored document.

examples.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its PageCollection, and resize each page to the predefined A5 size.

examples.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Size
examples.description: Shows how to change the dimensions of the first page of a PDF to 500 × 700 points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has at least seven pages, and change page 7 to Letter format using the SetPageSize method, then save the document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
examples.description: Shows how to proportionally shrink PDF pages so they fit within an A4 printable area (595 × 842 points) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
examples.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑resize all pages in a PDF to a target width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio, and then save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Loads a source PDF and a template PDF, extracts the template's page dimensions, and applies those dimensions to every page in the source PDF before saving the result.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
examples.description: Shows how to determine the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize every page to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Loads a PDF, checks each page's width, and resizes only pages wider than 600 points to A4 size, leaving narrower pages unchanged.

examples.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping a PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, optionally sets a CropBox on a page, then reads and prints each page's TrimBox to verify the final content area.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through every page, set each page's rotation to 180°, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and rotate pages whose numbers are divisible by three by 90 degrees before saving the result.

examples.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has at least four pages, rotate the fourth page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating specific pages based on a dictionary of page‑number to angle, and saving the result using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and rotate even‑numbered pages 90° while leaving odd pages unchanged.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order (90° Clockwise)
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Set BleedBox Extending Beyond CropBox in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read each page of a PDF, calculate a bleed area by extending the CropBox by 5 points on all sides, and assign it to the page's BleedBox using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a corporate brand RGB background color to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color from Theme Config
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a theme name from a configuration file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
examples.description: Shows how to convert HSL color values to RGB and apply the resulting color as a page background in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make the document and each page background transparent in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, useful for overlay scenarios.

examples.title: Remove Blank PDF Pages with Custom Tolerance
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, evaluates each page for blank content using a custom pixel‑tolerance factor, deletes pages considered blank, and saves the trimmed document.

examples.title: Trim White Space from PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space on each PDF page by detecting the content bounding box and setting the TrimBox accordingly, skipping blank pages.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF and Save with FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, inserting an image onto the first page, and saving the result using a FileStream that is properly disposed.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
examples.description: Demonstrates loading multiple PDFs, exporting each form's fields to JSON, and merging them into a single JSON array for batch processing.

examples.title: Combine PDF Page Vector Graphics into a Multi‑Page SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor, wraps each page's graphics in a <g> element, and writes a single combined multi‑page SVG file.

examples.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
examples.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SVG extractor, and merges all fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Count AcroForm Fields in a PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, accesses the Form collection, and outputs the total number of AcroForm fields present in the document.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields and Log Details
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and lists every form field with its name, type, and current value.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and export all form field names and values to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, verifying its existence, and exporting all AcroForm fields (annotations) to an XFDF file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, extracts their values, and writes the result to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form via the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade, and writes the form field values to an FDF file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form via the Form facade, and writes the form fields to an FDF file using ExportFdf with proper stream disposal.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON or XFDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and exports its form fields to a JSON file or all annotations to an XFDF file based on a command‑line format flag.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string using Form.ExportToJson, and output the JSON.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document with form fields using Aspose.Pdf and exporting the form data to a UTF-8 encoded JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields from a PDF document directly to a JSON file using a FileStream with Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF document to an XML representation directly into a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Byte Array
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts its form fields as JSON, writes the JSON to a MemoryStream, and returns the resulting byte array for API consumption.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Files
examples.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDFs, extract each document's form data, and write the data to individual JSON files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to export form field data from a PDF document to an XFDF file via a FileStream, handling resource disposal with using blocks.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
examples.description: Loads a PDF document and saves its form fields as an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's XmlSaveOptions.

examples.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image at Specified DPI
examples.description: Shows how to rasterize a single PDF page to a PNG file with a defined resolution (DPI) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Table to CSV with Border Markers
examples.description: Shows how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write them to a CSV file while preserving visual border information by wrapping cell contents with delimiters.

examples.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Options and Extract Vector Graphics
examples.description: Demonstrates how to save an entire PDF as a single SVG using custom DPI and multithreading settings, and how to extract individual vector graphics from each page with configurable extraction options.

examples.title: Export Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
examples.description: Shows how to extract each subpath from a PDF page and save it as an individual SVG file with a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its AcroForm fields, captures the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the resulting boolean list to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using TextDevice, and write it to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a designated output folder.

examples.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use GraphicsAbsorber and SvgExtractor to collect graphic elements from selected PDF pages and save them as SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each image as a PNG file to an output folder.

examples.title: Extract and Export Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, uses GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements, filters them by bounding‑box area, and saves the qualifying graphics as individual SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF and Save as Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from a PDF, preserve line breaks, and write the extracted content to a .txt file. Includes a helper that creates a sample PDF if none exists.

examples.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Statistics from PDF
examples.description: Loads one or more PDF files and logs the number of distinct fonts, tables, and form fields found in each document.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to Dictionary
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current value.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form XObjects with Timestamp Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through each page and form XObject, extract its text using Aspose.Pdf, and log start and end timestamps for the extraction run.

examples.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs with Indentation to Markdown
examples.description: Loads a PDF, uses ParagraphAbsorber to retrieve paragraphs, calculates leading spaces from each paragraph's X‑indent, prepends those spaces to preserve indentation, and saves the result as a Markdown file.

examples.title: Extract Stamp Texts from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, extracts the visible text of StampAnnotation objects, and writes the collected strings to a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract PDF Subpaths to Individual PNG Images
examples.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to capture each SubPath on PDF pages, render it on a temporary page, and save it as a separate PNG file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF and export each detected table to its own CSV file, with optional sample PDF creation.

examples.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and prints the label of the selected option for each radio button field.

examples.title: Extract a Single Graphic Element from PDF as SVG
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use SvgExtractor to get vector graphics from a page, pick an element by its index, and save it as an SVG file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF, identify superscript and subscript characters using font size and baseline heuristics, and write the annotated results to a text file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect superscript and subscript text fragments, and output the extracted text with Unicode markers.

examples.title: Extract SVG Graphics from PDF and Apply Brand Color Transformation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract vector graphics as SVG from each PDF page, replace specific colors to match a brand palette, and save the transformed SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract text from all pages, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, locate vector graphic objects, and save each graphic as a separate PDF file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, verify a page contains vector graphics, and extract each graphic as a separate SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF as Individual SVG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, detect pages with vector graphics, and export each graphic to separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics to SVG Preserving Coordinate System
examples.description: Shows how to iterate PDF pages and save their vector graphics as SVG files while keeping the original coordinate system, using TrySaveVectorGraphics with a fallback to SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Set Values
examples.description: Loads a PDF, loops through each form field, displays its name and value, and sets default values based on the field type before saving the document.

examples.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page, retrieves the form fields in tab order, and prints each field's name and type.

examples.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its AcroForm, and enumerating each form field's name, type, and value.

examples.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, count the form fields on that page, and log the counts for monitoring purposes.

examples.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Its Value
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF form checkbox's visual style and color using Aspose.PDF.Drawing, draw a custom check mark, and then read the checkbox value.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf. Each file is processed in parallel and the results are stored in a thread‑safe collection.

examples.title: Parse Number Form Fields from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, extracts numeric values from NumberField objects, parses them to decimal, and writes the results with a simple calculation to a text file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Summary Report: Graphics, Text Length, and Image Count
examples.description: The example loads PDF files, counts vector graphics, extracts the total length of all text, and counts embedded images, then prints a summary for each document.

examples.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream and enumerating its AcroForm fields without writing to disk, including creating a sample PDF with a text box when the source file is absent.

examples.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses the first checkbox field in the interactive form, reads its string Value property, and converts it to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

examples.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate all form fields, printing each field's name, value, and type.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, accessing a form field via the Form indexer, and reading its current value.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its AcroForm, iterate through each form field, and obtain the concrete runtime type of each field using GetType().

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Metadata and Count Vector Graphics
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reading basic metadata such as title, author, subject, and keywords, and outlines where vector graphics extraction could be added.

examples.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installed Fonts
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all text fragments, checks each fragment's font against the system font repository, and reports any fonts that are not installed.

examples.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to PDF Second Page
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field on the bottom‑right corner of the second page, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and saves the signed document.

examples.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature that records the signing time while preserving the original PDF layout using incremental updates.

examples.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Signature to PDF
examples.description: The example loads a PDF from a file stream, adds a signature field, and applies a PKCS#7 detached digital signature using a PFX certificate, then saves the signed document.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by using a dictionary that maps file names to their passwords, leveraging Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted PDFs into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a folder, derives a password from each file name, encrypts each document with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the encrypted copies to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Hashed Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from a SHA‑256 hash of its name and the current date.

examples.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a visible digital signature using a PFX certificate, compress the signed documents by optimizing resources, and save the results.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign multiple PDF files in a batch, selecting the appropriate X.509 certificate from a database (or file) based on each document's type metadata, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, read a metadata value (Title) to choose a certificate, and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, add a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, and optionally timestamp the signature with a TSA.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Image
examples.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a signature field to each document, and signs it using a PKCS#1 certificate while applying a document‑specific PNG image as the visible signature appearance.

examples.title: Certify PDF with Append-Only Signature to Allow Adding Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a DocMDP certification signature using Aspose.Pdf, set the document to append‑only mode, and save the PDF so that new pages can be added after signing.

examples.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
examples.description: Shows how to apply a certification signature to a PDF that disallows any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Certify PDF with DocMDP and Prevent Further Signatures
examples.description: Shows how to apply a DocMDP certification signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, making the document read‑only and disallowing any additional signatures.

examples.title: Compute and Verify PDF Hash Before and After Signing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to calculate a SHA‑256 hash of a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 detached signature, extract the signed ByteRange, and compare hashes to ensure document integrity.

examples.title: Custom PDF Security with Disabled Copy‑Paste and Watermark
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a simple custom security handler to disable copy‑paste via PDF permissions and add a visible warning overlay using a text stamp on each page.

examples.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs encryption and decryption operations, then encrypts and opens a PDF using this handler.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Encrypted with Certificate Using Hardware Token
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF that was encrypted with a public certificate and decrypt it by locating the matching private key stored on a hardware token or smart card in the current user's store.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypt it, and extract all images from each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypting it, extracting all embedded images to files, and then re‑encrypting the document with a new owner password and specific permissions.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign Multiple Signature Fields with Different Certificates
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using a password, extracts all signature fields, and re‑signs each field with a distinct certificate from PFX files, then saves the decrypted and signed document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
examples.description: The example demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, removing its encryption, modifying metadata such as title, author, and subject, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, and saving the unprotected file with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Download PDF, Apply Digital Signature, and Upload to Azure Blob
examples.description: The example downloads a PDF (or creates a blank one), adds a signature field, signs it with a PFX certificate, and uploads the signed document to Azure Blob Storage.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption, define user and owner passwords, set permissions, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, sets permissions to allow content extraction (copying) but disables printing, and saves the encrypted file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Printing & Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with user and owner passwords, while granting permissions for printing and content extraction (copying).

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only printing (disabling content extraction), and save the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, and disable all permissions including printing, then save the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that viewing is unrestricted while editing requires an owner password, with specific permissions applied.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting an owner password, allowing high‑resolution printing, and restricting content copying.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, limit permissions to printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate from HSM
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a public certificate whose private key resides on a hardware security module or smart card, and set specific permissions for the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting user and owner passwords, defining permissions, encrypting the document with AES‑256, and saving the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords, Then Remove User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening it with the owner password to remove the user password while keeping the document encrypted and preserving permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, encrypts it with a user password using AES‑256, and returns the encrypted PDF bytes.

examples.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment, encrypt the PDF with user/owner passwords, add a signature field, and digitally sign the document using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Extract Existing Signature Fields and Add a New Empty Signature Field
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, lists all existing signature form fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting the X509 certificate from each signature field, building its certificate chain, and saving each certificate as a DER file.

examples.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds signature fields, retrieves each signature's algorithm information, and logs the digest (hash) algorithm used.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Images from Signed PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save all embedded images as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from Each Page of a Signed PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save every image found on each page into separate page‑specific folders.

examples.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration Dates
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds digital signature fields, extracts the attached X509 certificate, builds its trust chain, and reports the expiration status of each certificate in the chain.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through form fields, detect signature fields, and retrieve both field and signature details for auditing purposes.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, checks for form fields, iterates through them to find signature fields, and prints each field's full name together with the page number it appears on.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, locates a specific signature field, extracts its appearance image, and writes the image to a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate signature form fields, and extract their appearance images as JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature and Convert to UTC
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over signature fields, retrieves the signing time from each signature, and converts it to UTC in ISO‑8601 format.

examples.title: List Signature Field Object IDs in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate signature fields in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and obtain their low‑level COS dictionary object IDs using reflection.

examples.title: Lock PDF with Digital Signature (MDP)
examples.description: Demonstrates applying a certification (MDP) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, which locks the document in read‑only mode after signing.

examples.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF (When Allowed)
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and save it to produce an unsigned PDF if the document's permissions permit.

examples.title: Restrict Copy‑Paste in PDF with Encryption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply password protection, limit permissions to printing only, and save the secured document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its signature fields, and read the Reason and Location metadata stored in each digital signature.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf and restrict permissions so that content extraction and form filling are disabled, allowing only printing.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then flatten the document so the signature visual cannot be altered.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Append‑Only Signature for Future Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature, and mark the PDF for incremental updates so additional signatures can be added later.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XFA Data
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, assigning custom XFA form data, creating a digital signature field, signing the document with a PKCS#1 certificate, and saving the signed PDF.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and embed custom XMP metadata that describes the signing details.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, then flattening all form fields so they become part of the page content.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token Certificate (PKCS#11)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a certificate from a hardware token and apply a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, lock the signature field, and enforce append‑only saving to prevent further modifications.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Lock Specific Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and setting selected form fields to read‑only in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations While Preserving the Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF, disable signature sanitization, delete every annotation except the signature field, and save the cleaned document.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Custom XML Signature using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and embed custom XML data via a custom signing delegate.

examples.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with an ECC P‑256 private key using Aspose.Pdf, creating a visible signature field and applying the signature.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact Info, and Location
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location metadata fields.

examples.title: Sign PDF with RSA Private Key using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and digitally sign it with a 4096‑bit RSA private key stored in a PFX file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with SHA-384 Digest Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a signature field, and apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate with the SHA‑384 digest algorithm.

examples.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF, adds a signature field, configures a PKCS#7 detached signature to use the SHA‑512 digest algorithm, and signs the document with a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field, retrieving a certificate from a smart card, and signing the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate (No PIN Prompt)
examples.description: Shows how to sign a PDF using a certificate stored on a smart card with Aspose.Pdf, leveraging ExternalSignature to avoid a PIN prompt.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp from TSA
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, create a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, configure timestamp settings from a trusted TSA server, and save the signed document.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field with a custom image as the visible appearance, and signing it using a PKCS#1 certificate.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Windows Certificate Store using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a certificate by thumbprint in the CurrentUser store, create an ExternalSignature, add a visible signature field, and sign a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using OCSP
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, locate the first signature field, and verify the signature with OCSP revocation checking using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and Retrieve Signing Certificate
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature using strict validation, and extracts the signing certificate details via Aspose.Pdf's validation result or the signature object.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Checks
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, configures validation to use CRL distribution points in strict mode, and verifies each signature field's revocation status.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and List Certificate SANs
examples.description: Opens a signed PDF, verifies each signature field, extracts the signing certificate and displays its Subject Alternative Name entries.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, validates each digital signature using strict validation, extracts the signing time, and checks that the timestamp falls inside the signer's certificate validity period.

examples.title: Validate PDF Signature Against Trusted Root CA
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF and a trusted root certificate, configure strict validation options, and verify digital signatures using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PKCS#7 Detached Signature and Certificate Chain
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, find signature fields, extract a PKCS#7 detached signature, and verify it while checking the certificate chain using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Auto-Adjusting Text Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp to each page of a PDF and automatically adjust its font size to fit a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered text stamp with a bold font to simulate an outlined (fill‑stroke) effect on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Opacity to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextStamp with 0.6 opacity, and applying it to every page before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Custom Page Stamp with Specific Size and Position
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PdfPageStamp, set custom width, height, and placement coordinates, and apply it to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Text Stamp to First PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to place a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place a rotated image stamp as a diagonal, semi‑transparent watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent, 45‑degree rotated text stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a fixed-dimension image stamp on every page of a PDF, independent of page size, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp as a full‑page background watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Stamp Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp from a PNG, set its opacity to 1.0, center it, and apply it to every page as a visible watermark.

examples.title: Add Image Background to Page Using FloatingBox
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as a background inside a FloatingBox that covers the entire fourth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text to PDF Page 3
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp with alternative text for accessibility, positioning it, and adding it to the third page before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, adds an image stamp to the first page, flattens all annotations so they become part of the page content, and saves the result as a read‑only PDF.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp as Background to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp behind the content of each page in a PDF by setting the ImageStamp's Background property to true using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an image into a MemoryStream and apply it as an ImageStamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp with Percentage Positioning
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each PDF page using offsets expressed as percentages of the page width and height.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply an image stamp to every page, and save the document while keeping existing AcroForm fields unchanged.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating an image stamp with alignment and opacity, adding it to a page, and saving the document while keeping all original annotations intact.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Bookmarks
examples.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the original bookmarks and document outline unchanged.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Embedded Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp to every page of a PDF and keep any embedded files intact using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving JavaScript Actions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and keep any existing JavaScript actions intact.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Page Labels
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, place it on every page, and save the document while keeping existing page labels unchanged.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving XMP Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF and keep the original XMP metadata intact using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, apply an image stamp to every page, and save the document while preserving its encryption.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF Page with Quality and Opacity
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on the second page of a PDF, setting the stamp to 100 % quality and 0.8 opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Form Fields
examples.description: Loads a PDF containing form fields, creates a semi‑transparent ImageStamp from a PNG, positions it in the top‑right corner, adds the stamp to every page, and saves the result while keeping the form fields interactive.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF without Invalidating Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a digitally signed PDF, adding a semi‑transparent image stamp to the first page, and saving the document using Aspose.PDF's incremental‑update mode so the existing signature remains valid.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to Top‑Right Corner of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (e.g., a logo) in the top‑right corner of every page of a PDF with configurable margin offsets using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp with Alternative Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp with alternative (alt) text to each page of a PDF and converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp with Opacity to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image stamp with 40% opacity on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alternative Text to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF page and assign multilingual Unicode alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Low‑Quality Image Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp with reduced quality (10 %) to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, improving performance for large documents.

examples.title: Add Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-line disclaimer text stamp to each page of a PDF and control the line spacing using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on a PDF page using the StrokeText rendering mode to create outlined (stroke‑only) text with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a PDF page stamp to a range of pages (5‑10) using Aspose.Pdf, including opacity and background settings.

examples.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each PDF page and rotate it 90 degrees to match portrait‑to‑landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp, rotating it 30 degrees, styling it, and applying it to every page of a PDF as a slanted watermark.

examples.title: Add RTL Text Stamp to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a right‑to‑left Arabic or Hebrew text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi-transparent image stamp (logo) at the center of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a centered semi‑transparent red "CONFIDENTIAL" TextStamp, applies it to every page by iterating through the document, and saves the stamped PDF.

examples.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text stamp with a colored background box on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp rotated 180° (upside‑down) on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp, and apply it to every page using a foreach loop before saving the document.

examples.title: Apply PDF Page as Background Stamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a page from another PDF as a background stamp on each page of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Bottom‑Left Text Stamp with 10‑Point Margin
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to a PDF and aligning it to the bottom‑left corner with a 10‑point margin using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Page Stamp from PDF Template
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a page from an existing PDF as a stamp template and apply it to every page of another PDF document.

examples.title: Fit Image Stamp Within Rectangle in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, define a target rectangle, and add an image stamp that automatically scales and centers to fit the rectangle while preserving its aspect ratio, then save the document.

examples.title: Place Image Stamp at Custom Coordinates in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page at specific X and Y coordinates, with custom size and opacity, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Image Stamp and Add to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it 45 degrees, and placing it on a page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF, scaling it to match the page width while keeping the original aspect ratio.

examples.title: Add 3D Annotation with Front View to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a 3‑D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation, create a front‑view camera, and set it as the default view.

examples.title: Add 3D Annotation with U3D Model and Initial View on Page Two
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a U3D 3‑D model into a PDF as a 3D annotation, set an initial view, and place it on the second page of the document.

examples.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera View to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates embedding a U3D/PRC 3D model into a PDF and defining a custom camera angle using Aspose.Pdf 3D annotation classes.

examples.title: Add Animated GIF as Screen Annotation on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a ScreenAnnotation that displays an animated GIF on the third page of a PDF and saves the result.

examples.title: Add Arrow Line Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a line annotation with an arrow ending on an existing PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Audio to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP3 file as a RichMedia annotation that automatically plays when the page becomes visible, and saves the modified PDF.

examples.title: Add Background Image as Artifact to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a BackgroundArtifact from an image file, marking it as a background, adding it to a page's Artifacts collection, and saving the modified PDF.

examples.title: Add Bates Numbering Artifact to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a Bates numbering artifact with a custom "ABC" prefix and a six‑digit format to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Button Annotation to Navigate to Page 10
examples.description: Shows how to create a button annotation in a PDF that, when activated, jumps to page 10 of the same document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Button to Export Annotations as JSON
examples.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button form field into a PDF that runs JavaScript to collect all annotations and output them as a JSON string.

examples.title: Add Button to Highlight Text Fields via JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to create a push‑button annotation in a PDF that executes JavaScript to highlight all text fields on the current page.

examples.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free‑Text Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout leader line in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example sets the Intent, defines the Callout points, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Centered Watermark Annotation to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a WatermarkAnnotation with 30 % opacity at the center of page six of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a WatermarkAnnotation with a runtime‑generated date string to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place a WatermarkAnnotation with a page‑number placeholder that automatically updates on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add External Link Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a link annotation that opens an external URL when clicked, by adding it to a PDF page and saving the document.

examples.title: Add Rounded-Corner Rectangle Annotation Around a Table
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, detects the first table using TableAbsorber, expands its bounding rectangle, and adds a square annotation with a blue border (simulating a rounded‑corner rectangle) around the table.

examples.title: Add Figure Annotation with External Image
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external image file into a PDF and reference it as a figure (file attachment) annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add square figure annotations with a specific border color and line width to selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Footer Watermark Annotation to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through all pages, and placing a semi‑transparent WatermarkAnnotation in the footer area of each page, then saving the result.

examples.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, specifying Arial font, 12‑point size, and black color, then saving the modified document.

examples.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a FreeTextAnnotation with a light gray background and a simple border, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a free‑text annotation with a callout line, configuring its appearance, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Gradient Background using BackgroundArtifact
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a page, and applying a BackgroundArtifact as a page background (using a solid color as a placeholder for a gradient) before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a highlight annotation with 70% opacity, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a HighlightAnnotation with a specific color and opacity, attach it to a page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add High‑Resolution PDF Page as Tiled Background
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background by creating a BackgroundArtifact and attaching it to a new document page.

examples.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that jumps to a specific page within the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button on page 4 of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Open URL
examples.description: Shows how to create a link annotation with a JavaScript action that opens a specified URL in a new browser window using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a link annotation in a PDF that executes JavaScript to display a custom modal dialog box using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Word Count
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation to a PDF page that runs JavaScript to calculate the document's total word count and displays it in an alert.

examples.title: Add Looping Video Screen Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a video file as a ScreenAnnotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, place it on a page, and save the document. (Loop playback and control hiding would require additional settings.)

examples.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation with Custom Thickness
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an underline annotation to a PDF page, set its color to magenta, and define a 2‑point line thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Multiline Free‑Text Annotation with Line Spacing
examples.description: Shows how to create a free‑text annotation on a PDF page, set multiline content, and approximate a 1.5 line‑spacing using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create and add a custom polyline figure annotation to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a polyline annotation with custom vertices, configuring its appearance, and saving the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to a Text Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a parent TextAnnotation and associate a PopupAnnotation that shows additional notes when the parent is selected, then saves the updated PDF.

examples.title: Add Popup Annotation with Custom Size and Position
examples.description: Shows how to create a TextAnnotation and attach a PopupAnnotation with custom dimensions and positioning relative to its parent markup in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add QR Code Watermark to PDF Using WatermarkArtifact
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a QR code image as a watermark artifact positioned at the top‑right corner of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages

examples.description: The example creates a PDF document, draws a simple line graph using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then serializes the PDF into a byte array for network transmission.

examples.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a simple horizontal bar chart by adding rectangle shapes to a Graph with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Full‑Page Graphs
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing several pages, each page holding a Graph object that matches the page's width and height using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
examples.description: Generates a PDF containing a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes whose border colors are retrieved from a dictionary lookup table.

examples.title: Create PDF Graph with Filled and Stroke‑Only Shapes
examples.description: Shows how to add a Graph to a PDF page and draw rectangles and ellipses with both fill colors and stroke‑only rendering using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Proportional Graph Shapes on Each Page
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF where each page contains a graph with rectangles, ellipses, and lines sized and positioned proportionally to the page dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a PDF with a Single Default Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add one default‑size page, and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and Text Fragments
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph containing rectangle and ellipse shapes to a PDF and place text fragments with different fonts inside each shape.

examples.title: Create PDF with Graph in Memory
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document in memory using a MemoryStream, add a simple graph with a rectangle shape, and return the result as a byte array.

examples.title: Create PDF with Layered Graph Shapes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a layer (optional content group) to a PDF page and draw shapes inside a Graph container, allowing layer visibility control.

examples.title: Create Predefined Graph with Shapes for PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line that can be added to any PDF page.

examples.title: Create Semi‑Transparent Rectangle with Graph in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a graph container to a PDF page and draw a semi‑transparent rectangle using GraphInfo settings.

examples.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to generate a star-shaped Path with a configurable number of points, add it to an Aspose.Pdf Graph, apply fill and stroke colors, and save the document as a PDF.

examples.title: Create Graph with Custom Border and Rectangle in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to configure a Graph's line width and dash pattern for its border, add a styled rectangle inside the graph, and save the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Deserialize PDF and Add Graph with Text Label
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF (or creates a new one), inserts a Graph containing a rectangle bar, adds a positioned text label, and saves the result.

examples.title: Draw Straight Line in PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, adding a Graph container, drawing a line with specified start and end points, setting its color and thickness, and saving the file.

examples.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, add a Graph containing a rectangle shape, and save it as a new PDF file.

examples.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, writes it into a MemoryStream, and then copies the stream to a new file on disk.

examples.title: Generate PDF with Overlapping Shapes Using Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, and draw overlapping rectangle and ellipse shapes. Shows where BoundsCheckMode would be applied for overlap prevention.

examples.title: Insert Centered Text into a Graph Rectangle
examples.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle using a Graph object and place a centered TextFragment inside it on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert and Rotate Scaled Image in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an external image, scale it proportionally to a target width, rotate it by a specified angle, and place it at the center of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Log Graph Shape Bounding Boxes in PDF

examples.title: Out‑of‑Bounds Rectangle Throws BoundsOutOfRangeException
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable strict bounds checking on an Aspose.Pdf graph and verify that adding a rectangle larger than the container raises a BoundsOutOfRangeException using a unit test.

examples.title: Create a PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
examples.description: Shows how to place several Graph objects at different coordinates on a single PDF page, combining rectangles, ellipses, and lines to form a collage using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Graph Element in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a Graph container, add a rectangle shape, apply a rotation angle in degrees, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Non‑Uniformly Scale Graph on X and Y Axes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply different scaling factors to a Graph container in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and adds a rectangle shape to visualize the effect.

examples.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using GraphInfo
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes within an Aspose.Pdf Graph by setting GraphInfo scaling rates, then adds basic shapes and saves the PDF.

examples.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse Fill in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page and apply a semi‑transparent fill color using the ARGB alpha channel with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Graph Dimensions in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph object, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a matching rectangle shape, and saving the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity Using ARGB Color in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a rectangle in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a 50% transparent fill using an ARGB color value, verify the fill color, and save the document.

examples.title: Simulate Clipping of Shapes Using Graph in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to restrict drawing of shapes to a rectangular region by adding an invisible clipping rectangle and placing shapes inside an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph container.

examples.title: Skew Graph on X Axis in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to apply a skew transformation to a Graph container on the X axis and draw a rectangle inside it, creating a slanted visual effect in a PDF document.

examples.title: Toggle Graph BoundsCheckMode in Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to switch the Graph.BoundsCheckMode between throwing an exception for out‑of‑bounds shapes and the default ignore behavior based on a user setting, then adds a simple line shape to the graph.

examples.title: Translate Graph Element Position in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle shape, defining a placement rectangle, translating it with MoveBy, and positioning the graph on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate Graph Shape Placement with BoundsCheckMode
examples.description: Shows how to enable BoundsCheckMode on an Aspose.Pdf Graph to ensure shapes fit within the graph area, handling overflow exceptions and saving the PDF.

examples.title: Validate Shape Bounds and Log Details in PDF
examples.description: The example shows how to manually check whether a rectangle fits within a PDF page, throw a custom exception when it does not, log detailed shape coordinates, and then add the shape to the page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages with Opacity
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent background image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a semi‑transparent background image to each page using a BackgroundArtifact, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to apply a semi‑transparent background pattern image to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent background pattern image to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Texture Image with Overlay Blend to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent background image to each PDF page and setting its blend mode to overlay using Aspose.PDF.

examples.title: Add Company Logo to First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp for a logo, center it on the first page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Decorative Footer Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert a footer image on each page of a PDF and scale it proportionally to the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image watermark on every page of a PDF and rotate it 45 degrees for diagonal placement using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a DICOM medical image via a FileStream and inserting it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add PNG Logo to First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, place a PNG logo at specific coordinates on the first page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Raster Image to PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory PNG raster image and inserting it onto a new PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the page's Paragraphs collection.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Color Overlay to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a theme configuration file and applying a semi‑transparent colored overlay to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with configurable opacity, apply it to each page, and save the watermarked document.

examples.description: Shows how to extract a vector graphic from one PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and place it on another page with a new position.
