examples.description: Shows how to traverse tagged tables in a PDF, collect row and cell metadata, and serialize the complete table structure to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract and Modify Tables on Rotated PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect rotated pages, use TableAbsorber to locate tables on those pages, and modify the text of a table cell before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, extract each cell's text, and write the data to CSV files.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF to DataTable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables in a PDF, convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, and populate it with cell text values.

examples.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber and retrieve each table's bounding rectangle coordinates.

examples.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables, and iterate through tables, rows, cells, and text fragments to retrieve content and positions.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Tables Using TableAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and read the concatenated text of each cell.

examples.title: Generate PDF Report with Multiple Tables from DataTables
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with separate pages, each containing a table imported from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import DataTable Images into PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates loading image bytes from a DataTable and inserting them into a PDF table, rendering each image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.Image objects.

examples.title: Import DataTable into a PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to populate an Aspose.Pdf Table directly from an in‑memory DataTable using Table.ImportDataTable and save the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory DataTable, configuring an Aspose.Pdf Table (adjustment, borders, column widths) and importing the DataTable into the PDF before saving the document.

examples.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to import a filtered DataView into an Aspose.Pdf Table, add it to a page, and save the result as a PDF document.

examples.title: Insert External Image into Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an external image file to a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

examples.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into Table Cell
examples.description: Shows how to generate an image in memory, write it to a MemoryStream, and embed it into a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

examples.title: Insert New Column into PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to add a new column to an existing table in a PDF by inserting a Cell into each Row at a specified zero‑based index using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Page Break After Table Row in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to force a specific table row onto a new page in a PDF by setting the IsInNewPage property, creating a page break after a given row.

examples.title: Insert SVG Image into a PDF Table Cell
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table, and place an SVG image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Table After Specific Paragraph in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates locating a paragraph containing a marker text and inserting a Table immediately after it in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Table After Paragraph in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and then insert a table directly after that paragraph using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a table at exact X and Y coordinates on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the Table's Left and Top properties and adding it to the page's paragraph collection.

examples.title: Insert Table Before an Image in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate an image on each PDF page and insert a table directly before it using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a formatted table with header and data rows, position it on a specific page, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Table Using Column Mapping
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reorder a DataTable based on a column‑mapping dictionary and import the reordered data into an Aspose.Pdf Table within a PDF document.

examples.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan

examples.description: Demonstrates executing a LINQ query, loading the results into a DataTable, and importing that DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table which is then saved as a PDF document.

examples.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber, delete the first found table, and save the modified document.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to scan all tables in a PDF, detect a specific keyword in any cell, and delete the matching tables using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a high‑resolution image to a table cell in a PDF by enabling resolution handling and scaling the image before saving the document.

examples.title: Render Table on a New PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF page, build a table with header and data rows, and add it to the page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Keyword in PDF Table Cells

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating the first page, creating a table with header and data rows, and inserting it onto the rotated page before saving.

examples.description: Shows how to rotate a whole table by setting the page rotation (transformation matrix) before adding the table to the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Text Inside a Table Cell
examples.description: Demonstrates rotating text within a PDF table cell by setting the TextFragment's rotation angle and adding it to the cell.

examples.title: Set Cell Background Color in PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with a table and apply a background color to a specific cell using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Cell Margins in a PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table and apply custom margins to a table cell using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo object.

examples.title: Set Cell Vertical Alignment to Middle in PDF Table

examples.title: Set Custom Row Height in PDF Table

examples.description: Demonstrates how to define a constant row height for all rows in an Aspose.Pdf table by setting the FixedRowHeight property before adding cells, and then saves the document.

examples.title: Set Landscape Orientation and Add Wide Table to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page to landscape orientation and insert a wide table that fits the page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Maximum Column Width for PDF Tables

examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextParagraph, configure its layout, add multiple lines efficiently, and place it on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML Styles

examples.title: Apply Different Page Margins to PDF Sections
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set distinct margin sets for specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo and PageInfo objects.

examples.title: Apply Custom Page Background Colors from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read hex or named color values from an XML file and set each PDF page's background color accordingly using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to HTML for Web Preview
examples.description: Loads a PDF generated from XML and saves it as an HTML file using Aspose.Pdf, embedding raster images as PNG inside SVG.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF with Default XSLT Transformation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file without a custom XSLT and converting it directly to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert XML Files to PDFs and Merge into a Single Document
examples.description: The example converts each XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XML loading options, then merges all generated PDFs into one combined PDF file.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO stylesheet, and saving the resulting PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF with XSLT Transformation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSLT stylesheet during loading, and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert XML Files to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over XML files in a directory, bind each XML to an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it as a PDF while logging each step and handling errors.

examples.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF with Custom Warning Handler
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO document using Aspose.Pdf with a custom warning handler to gracefully handle parsing errors, then generating a PDF with user‑friendly messages.

examples.title: Create Barcodes in PDF from XML Template
examples.description: Loads a PDF layout from an XML file, reads barcode definitions from the same XML, generates Code128 barcodes and places them on the specified pages, then saves the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Section Titles
examples.description: Loads an XML file with section titles, generates a PDF page for each section, and adds outline (bookmark) entries that navigate to the corresponding pages.

examples.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XFA definition from an XML file, assigning it to a PDF document, and populating each form field with a default value.

examples.title: Create PDF from XML and Apply Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF that contains XML content as plain text and digitally signing it using a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Create PDF from XML String using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document with default settings and insert XML content as plain text using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Outline Hierarchy from XML Nesting
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file, bind it to a PDF, and generate a multi‑level outline that mirrors the XML element hierarchy for easy navigation.

examples.title: Create PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a Table of Contents by reading heading hierarchy from an XML file and using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content and TOC elements.

examples.title: Create Thumbnail from First Page of XML‑Generated PDF
examples.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and generates a PNG thumbnail of the first PDF page.

examples.title: Downsample Images in PDF Generated from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document, configuring optimization options to downsample large images and compress resources, and saving the optimized PDF.

examples.title: Embed 3D Models from XML into PDF as Interactive Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML list of 3D model files and embedding each as a PDF3D annotation on specified pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed Audio Annotations from XML into PDF
examples.description: Loads an XML file that lists audio files and their positions, creates SoundAnnotation objects for each entry, and embeds them into the specified pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, opening a custom TrueType font, marking it for embedding, and applying it to all text fragments before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Embed JavaScript in PDF from XML with a Validation Button
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, adding a document‑open JavaScript action, and creating a button field with a mouse‑release JavaScript for form validation.

examples.title: Embed Video Annotations from XML into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read video file references from an XML document and embed them as RichMedia video annotations on specific PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Generated from XML with DRM
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions, and saving the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Custom Security Handler
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and apply a custom encryption handler to protect the PDF with user and owner passwords.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF, and applying password‑based AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt XML‑to‑PDF with Restricted Permissions
examples.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then encrypts the PDF with user and owner passwords while disabling printing and copying by setting permissions to none.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images from XML
examples.description: Loads an XML file, generates a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml API, and saves each PDF page as a separate BMP image with a specified resolution.

examples.title: Extract PDF XML Representation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and export its internal XML representation to an external file.

examples.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure a TextAbsorber for pure text extraction, retrieve text from all pages, and write the result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Version 1.7 from XML
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF version 1.7 while creating a conversion log, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enable full‑screen viewer mode, and define the behavior after exiting full‑screen.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with Page Size Override
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML (optionally with an XSL stylesheet) into an Aspose.Pdf Document, enforce a uniform page size for all pages, and save the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XSL-FO or XML via Config File
examples.description: Shows how to read XSL‑FO or XML (with optional XSLT) file paths from a JSON configuration and create a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading XML data, converting it to a DataTable, and creating a PDF report with a table using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML with External CSS via XSL
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML document together with an XSL stylesheet that references external CSS files and convert the result to a styled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Handle Malformed XML During XML‑to‑PDF Conversion
examples.description: Demonstrates how to abort an XML‑to‑PDF conversion when the source XML is malformed by using a custom warning handler and exception handling with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Content Length
examples.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF, measure the text length on each page, and insert a blank page when the content exceeds a specified character threshold.

examples.title: Insert Dynamic Page Headers from XML into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading header text from an XML file and applying a different header to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF Pages from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read footnote definitions from an XML file and add them as footnote annotations to the corresponding pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Paginate Large XML to Multiple PDFs with Bates Numbering
examples.description: The example loads a large XML file, converts it to a PDF, splits the document into multiple PDF files each containing a fixed number of pages, and adds sequential Bates numbers to each page.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF template and an XML data file, assign the XML to the PDF's XFA form to fill form fields, and save the resulting populated PDF.

examples.title: Register PDF Output Generator Service
examples.description: Demonstrates how to register Aspose.Pdf's PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton in the .NET dependency injection container for reuse throughout an application.

examples.title: Render HTML CDATA Sections as PDF Pages
examples.description: Loads an XML file, extracts HTML fragments stored in CDATA sections, and converts each fragment into a separate page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Render SVG Elements from XML into PDF as Vector Graphics
examples.description: Shows how to extract <svg> markup from an XML file, convert each SVG to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, and combine the pages into a single PDF document.

examples.title: Render XML CDATA Sections to PDF
examples.description: The example loads an XML file, extracts all CDATA section contents, and writes each piece as a formatted text fragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define header rows in an Aspose.Pdf table and configure them to repeat automatically on every new page when the table spans multiple pages.

examples.title: Retry PDF Generation with Transient I/O Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a page, and saving it while applying exponential back‑off retry logic for transient I/O and Aspose.Pdf errors.

examples.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading margin definitions from an XML file and applying them to individual PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf before saving the modified document.

examples.title: Export PDF to HTML with Specified Image Resolution
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF document and export it to HTML while setting the DPI of the generated page images.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read page‑specific duration values from an XML file and apply them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML Layout
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read an orientation attribute from an XML file and apply landscape or portrait layout to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read page width and height values from an XML file and apply them to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document and configure viewer preferences such as fit‑window, center window, and page mode before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Split PDF into Chapters Using a Keyword
examples.description: The example loads an XML file as a PDF, detects pages that contain a chapter marker, and splits the PDF into separate chapter files.

examples.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Generation from XML Files in Parallel
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple XML files to PDF concurrently using Aspose.Pdf with thread‑safe handling via Parallel.ForEach and proper disposal of Document objects.

examples.title: Transform XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSLT stylesheet that defines distinct namespace prefixes, applying the transformation during PDF creation, and saving the result. Shows how Aspose.Pdf resolves namespace conflicts automatically.

examples.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF/A‑2b, validate the compliance, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Validate XML with XSD before Generating PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if the validation succeeds, converts the XML to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
